LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_43.english: I can't leave things as they are... I'll take them with me, even if it means forcing them.
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_43.korean: 이대로 둘 순 없어… 억지로라도 데려간다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_44.english: Commander, that child was the one who attacked first in the first place.
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_44.korean: 사령관 씨, 애초에 먼저 공격한 건 저 아이입니다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_45.english: If someone harms another person, they must be made to pay the price. That way, they won't act so recklessly again.
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_45.korean: 사람을 해치면, 그에 대한 대가가 있다는 걸 알려줘야 합니다.&n그래야 다음엔 함부로 그런 짓을 하지 않게 되죠.

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_46.english: Oh no, it's running away! Let's chase after it quickly! The Desire Walker controls so many spirits that we might miss it!
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_46.korean: 이런 도망가는 군요! 빨리 쫓아갑시다!&n데자이어 워커가 다루는 혼령들이 많아서 놓칠 수 있습니다!

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_47.english: - … Let's wait and see how things develop a little longer.

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_48.english: Stella? It's noisy outside... What happened...?
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_48.korean: 스텔라? 밖이 시끄러운데… 무슨 일 있었어요…?

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_49.english: Hela... look... bad people followed us... really bad people...
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_49.korean: 헬라 언니… 저기…&n나쁜 사람들이 따라왔어… 무지 나쁜 사람들이야…

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_5.english: … I’ll clear this area first. Please, the two of you, step back.
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_5.korean: …여기는 제가 먼저 정리하겠습니다. 두 사람은 물러서 주세요.

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_50.english: They say they have to take Hela away... They say they have to take her from me...
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_50.korean: 헬라 언니를 데려가야 한대… 나한테서 뺏어야 한대…

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_52.english: Are you saying those people are trying to take me away?

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_53.english: No way… the researchers here aren't planning to take me away to experiment on me…
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_53.korean: 설마… 이곳의 연구원들이 저를 데려가서 실험하려고…

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_54.english: Ugh... I don't want that...! Stella, what should we do...?

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_55.english: All humans hate me... So... let's go somewhere else.
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_55.korean: 인간들은 모두 날 싫어해… 그러니까… 우리, 다른 데로 가자.

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_56.english: The blank space is incredibly vast! So, I'm going to travel a lot starting now!
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_56.korean: 공백은 무지하게 넓어!&n그러니까 지금부터 잔뜩 여행을 할 거야!

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_57.english: Ah... but Human... uh... for now, escaping from here is the priority.
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_57.korean: 아… 하지만 인간님이…&n으응… 일단 지금은 여기서 도망가는 게 먼저예요.

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_59.english: I didn't think so... but I see you plan to keep going around together.
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_59.korean: 설마 했지만… 앞으로도 계속 같이 다니려는 거구나.

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_6.english: As expected of Mr. Nev! You're awesome!

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_61.english: Phew... I guess I have no choice but to admit it now. If that's what you want... Alright.
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_61.korean: 후우… 이제 인정할 수밖에 없겠구나.&n그게 네가 원하는 거라면… 알았다.

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_62.english: Now, Stella. I’m going to break down the wall to make a way out. Stand back a little.
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_62.korean: 자, 스텔라. 벽을 부숴서 밖으로 나가는 길을 만드마.&n조금 물러나 있거라.

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_63.english: No! I have a better idea!
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_63.korean: 아니야! 나한테 더 좋은 생각이 있어!

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_64.english: I found this place by chance a while ago, and there was a path hidden under the ground! If we go that way, people definitely won't be able to find us!
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_64.korean: 전에 우연히 찾은 곳인데, 여기 바닥 밑에 숨겨진 길이 있었어!&n그쪽으로 가면 분명 사람들도 우릴 찾지 못할 거야!

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_65.english: It’s better than heading out into the Soul Junk frenzy... Understood. I’ll head over there.
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_65.korean: 소울정크가 넘쳐나는 바깥으로 나가는 것보단 낫겠군…&n알겠다. 그쪽으로 가마.

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_66.english: Ugh... will I be able to escape from those bad people...?
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_66.korean: 으… 나쁜 사람들에게서 잘 도망칠 수 있을까요…?

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_67.english: I'm going to run away no matter what! I'm going to protect Hela!
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_67.korean: 무조건 도망칠 거야! 내가 헬라 언니를 지킬 거야!

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_68.english: Ah, I should take this too...

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_7.english: Then, shall I put in some effort for the first time in a while?
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_7.korean: 그럼 저도 간만에 힘 좀 써 보도록 할까요?

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_71.english: I'm worried if you can run well while holding something like that.
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_71.korean: 그런 걸 들고 잘 뛸 수 있을까 걱정이구나.

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_72.english: This is the friend Hela gave me! I can't leave you behind!
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_72.korean: 헬라 언니가 준 친구야! 놓고 갈 수는 없어!

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_74.english: Let's get out of here quickly before it's too late.
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_74.korean: 더 늦기 전에 어서 여기서 나가자꾸나.

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_75.english: This... the enemy's offensive is fierce.

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_76.english: At this rate, I might really miss out.

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_77.english: It's not about protecting, but about possessing. They probably wanted to make friends because they were lonely.
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_77.korean: 지키는 게 아니라 가지려는 겁니다.&n외로웠기 때문에 친구를 만들기 원했던 거겠죠.

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_79.english: There is no need to pity her. After all, she put an ordinary human being in danger because of her own desires.
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_79.korean: 동정할 필요 없습니다.&n자신의 욕망 때문에 평범한 인간을 위험에 빠뜨린 셈이니까요.

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_80.english: Desire Walker is true to her desires above all else… it is already beyond our common sense to understand.
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_80.korean: 데자이어 워커는 다른 무엇보다 자신의 욕망에 충실하지…&n이미 우리의 상식으로는 이해할 수 없어.

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_81.english: I can't… feel sorry for Desire Walker anymore.
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_81.korean: 더 이상… 데자이어 워커를 동정할 수는 없어.

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_82.english: That's exactly it, Mr. Nev! Then let's hurry and chase after them before we lose them!
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_82.korean: 바로 그겁니다, 네브 씨!&n그럼 놓치기 전에 서둘러 쫓죠!

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_83.english: Hey old man... are those people still chasing you?
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_83.korean: 저기 영감님… 그 사람들 계속 쫓아오고 있어?

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_84.english: Hmm... They are coming as if they knew in advance that we were coming this way.
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_84.korean: 흠… 마치 우리가 이쪽으로 올 걸 미리 알고 있었다는 듯이 오고 있구나.

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_85.english: Besides, perhaps there is a skilled one among them, as even the wolf pack is powerless. At this rate…
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_85.korean: 게다가 실력 있는 놈이 있는지, 늑대 무리도 힘을 못 쓰고 있다.&n이대로라면…

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_86.english: … I’m sorry, Stella. It looks like I’ll have to step in myself.
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_86.korean: …미안하구나, 스텔라.&n아무래도 내가 직접 나서야 할 것 같구나.

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_88.english: It looks like there is one non-human among them, but even so, she is just a struggling child in front of me. I’ll go teach her some manners.
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_88.korean: 인간이 아닌 놈이 하나 섞여 있는 듯하나, 그래 봐야 이 몸 앞에선 발버둥치는 어린아이.&n예의범절을 좀 가르쳐 주고 오마.

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_89.english: Yeah! Be careful not to get hurt.

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_9.english: Wow... this just never ends. Why would that Desire Walker go out of their way to stay holed up in a place like this?
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_9.korean: 이야… 이거 끝이 없네요.&n그 데자이어 워커는 왜 굳이 이런 곳에 틀어박혀 있는 걸까요?

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_90.english: Of course. Hela... I hate to say this to a human, but... please take care of Stella while I'm gone.
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_90.korean: 물론 그러마.&n헬라… 인간에게 이런 말은 하기 싫지만… 내가 없는 동안 스텔라를 부탁하마.

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_91.english: Yes! Be careful! You must come back! I will definitely protect Stella!
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_91.korean: 네! 조심하세요! 꼭 돌아오셔야 해요!&n제가 꼭 스텔라를 지킬게요!

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_92.english: Don't worry, I don't die so easily that it could be called a curse. Then I'll be going.
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_92.korean: 저주라 칭할 정도로 쉽게 죽는 몸은 아니니 걱정 말아라.&n그럼 다녀오마.

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_96.english: She's probably the strongest one among them. It looks like she's serious.
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_96.korean: 아마 놈들 중 가장 강한 녀석이겠죠.&n진심으로 나온 것 같군요.

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_97.english: You despicable things… I’ll kill you all.

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_98.english: Give up the thought of returning alive.

LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_99.english: It's definitely quite strong... It's going to take some time.
LastCorruptedRecord1-9ED_99.korean: 상당히 강한 건 분명해… 시간이 좀 걸리겠어.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_1.english: - Thanks to Iris's help, we won the fight against Soul Junk without anyone dying.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_1.korean: - 이리스의 도움 덕분에 우리는 아무도 죽지 않고 소울정크와의 싸움에서 승리했다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_10.english: It is better to waste your time than to suffer a loss.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_10.korean: 피해를 보는 것보단 허탕을 치는 게 나아.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_13.english: Both of you, please calm down. This isn't the time to fight, is it?
LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_13.korean: 두 사람 다 진정하세요.&n지금은 싸울 때가 아니잖아요?

LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_15.english: Haha, that's true. It seems like you two are in good sync now.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_15.korean: 후후, 그렇네요. 이제는 호흡이 잘 맞으시는 것 같네요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_16.english: Okay! Then let's do this! First, we'll check if there are any other competitors.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_16.korean: 좋아! 그럼 이렇게 하자!&n먼저 다른 경쟁자가 있는지부터 확인하는 거야.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_17.english: If there are no competitors, I will proceed safely as you suggested.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_17.korean: 만약 경쟁자가 없다면 네 말대로 안전한 방법으로 진행할게.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_18.english: But if there is a competitor, I'll move quickly using the method I've decided on. How about that?
LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_18.korean: 하지만 경쟁자가 있다면, 내가 정한 방법대로 빠르게 움직이는 거야. 어때?

LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_19.english: … Alright. Instead, in that case, we will do it with just you, me, and a small elite group.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_19.korean: …알았어.&n대신 그 경우에는 너와 나, 그리고 소수 정예 인원으로만 한다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_2.english: - Everyone was greatly pleased to have obtained a large amount of supplies without any casualties.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_2.korean: - 사상자 없이 많은 물자를 손에 넣은 것에 모두 크게 기뻐했다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_20.english: There won't be a huge gain, but you can reduce the risk.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_20.korean: 큰 이득은 없겠지만 위험은 줄일 수 있어.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_21.english: Well, if that's the case, I'll let you in.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_22.english: I can't believe the word 'compromise' is coming out of your mouth.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_25.english: Yes, sometimes it’s not bad to just watch like this.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_25.korean: 네, 가끔은 이렇게 지켜보는 것도 나쁘지 않네요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_26.english: Iris looks much brighter than before, too.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_26.korean: 이리스 양도 전보다 훨씬 밝아 보이고요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_28.english: How long are you going to stay like that? Surely… you don't actually like looking like that, do you?
LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_28.korean: 언제까지 그 모습으로 계실 건가요?&n설마… 그 모습이 마음에 드신 건 아니죠?

LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_29.english: Hey kid! Let's go! I can't stay in a place like this any longer!
LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_29.korean: 꼬맹이! 어서 가자! 더는 이런 곳이 못 있겠다!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_3.english: - With this, the relationship between Tenebris and Iris will probably improve a little.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_3.korean: - 이걸로 테네브리스와 이리스 두 사람의 관계도 조금은 나아지겠지.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_30.english: Hehehe... With this, a funny line will be added to my 'real notebook'.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_30.korean: 우후후… 이걸로 제 '진짜 수첩'에 재미있는 한 줄이 추가되겠네요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_32.english: … Hmm, this is quite strange. This wasn't the ending I wanted.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_32.korean: …흐음 이거 참 이상한 일이군요.&n제가 원하던 결말은 이게 아니었는데 말이에요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_34.english: I don't know what trick they used, but I never imagined they would approach Yuma in the form of a child.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_34.korean: 무슨 수를 쓴 건지 모르겠지만, 설마 어린아이의 모습으로 유마 씨에게 접근할 줄은 몰랐습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_36.english: Originally, more Soul Junk should have swarmed in when Mr. Nev was isolated in the department store.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_36.korean: 원래라면 백화점에서 네브 씨를 고립시켰을 때 더 많은 소울정크가 몰려들었어야 했습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_37.english: I must be the only one who can control Soul Junk in this void…
LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_37.korean: 이 공백 안에서 소울정크를 조종할 수 있는 건 저뿐일 텐데…

LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_38.english: It seems like someone is interfering with me... no, helping you, Commander.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_38.korean: 마치 누군가가 저의 방해를… 아니, 사령관 씨를 도와주고 있는 것 같군요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_39.english: Ooh-hoo-hoo, who on earth are you?

LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_42.english: Player: Commander &nCharacter: Iris Yuma &nEnding Branch: Achieved.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_42.korean: 플레이어 : 사령관&n인물 : 이리스 유마&n엔딩 분기 : 달성 완료.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_43.english: Permission to view the following records.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_46.english: Confirm denial of access to the record.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_46.korean: 해당 기록에 대한 접근 거부를 확인.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_49.english: Confirm denial of access to the record.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_49.korean: 해당 기록에 대한 접근 거부를 확인.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_5.english: Ha! This is so frustrating! Why can't you understand what I'm saying!?
LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_5.korean: 하! 답답하네! 왜 이렇게 말귀를 못 알아듣는 거야!?

LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_52.english: Check the restrictions on permissions that can be controlled within the game.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_52.korean: 게임 내 제어할 수 있는 권한의 제한을 확인.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_53.english: Start collecting clear data for the fifth record.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_53.korean: 다섯 번 째 기록의 클리어 데이터 수집을 시작합니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_54.english: Commander, there is not much I can do to help you now.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_54.korean: 사령관님, 이제 제가 도와드릴 수 있는 일은 많지 않습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_55.english: <Iris Yuma: The Unleashed Hammer of Wrath> END.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_57.english: Ah, somehow this happened... the timing to return to my original form—
LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_57.korean: 아, 이건 어쩌다 보니… 원래 모습으로 돌아갈 타이밍을ㅡ

LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_6.english: I told you you have to go in like this!
LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_6.korean: 그러니까 여긴 이렇게 들어가야 한다고 했잖아!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_7.english: That way, the risk of failure is high.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_8.english: Even if it takes time, it is the right way to proceed.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_8.korean: 시간이 걸리더라도 이쪽으로 진행하는 게 맞아.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_9.english: What are you going to do if you wait that long and end up wasting your time? It's much better to just get it done quickly!
LastCorruptedRecord2-10ED_9.korean: 그 시간을 기다리다 허탕만 치면 어떡할 건데?&n그럴 바엔 빠르게 진행하는 게 훨씬 낫지!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_1.english: For one, it probably isn't a lie.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_10.english: But after losing the rod, I just became a scared loser. Now, I have no intention of making the camp strong and am just barely surviving.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_10.korean: 하지만 로드를 잃은 후엔 그냥 겁먹은 찌질이가 되어버렸습니다.&n이제는 캠프를 강하게 만들 생각도 없이 그저 연명만 하고 있어요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_101.english: You also said it was cute, right?

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_104.english: … I’ll keep it. But don’t get me wrong! I’m taking it because it’s a waste to throw it away!
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_104.korean: …받아둘게.&n근데 오해하지 마! 버리긴 아까우니까 받는 거라고!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_106.english: - I suppose you could say it’s typical of Shirayuri. She’s still as good at exploiting her opponent’s weaknesses as ever.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_106.korean: - 시라유리 답다고 해야 할지. 상대방의 약점을 뒤흔드는 건 여전하네.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_107.english: - Anyway... there's no way it could have been this smooth.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_107.korean: - 그건 그렇고… 이렇게까지 순조로울 리 없을 거야.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_109.english: - Huh? Just now, surely...? A vibration?

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_11.english: It got even worse, especially after Yuma left. It was like I didn't even know what I was living for day after day.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_11.korean: 특히 유마 씨가 떠난 뒤로는 더 심해졌습니다.&n하루하루 대체 뭘 위해 사는지도 모르는 사람처럼 말이죠.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_110.english: Did you hear that sound just now?

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_111.english: A vibration from somewhere… Ah, the wall is shaking!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_112.english: Damn it, as expected, they won't just let it slide!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_114.english: I know! I have no intention of lingering here right now! Get everything ready! We're getting out of here fast!
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_114.korean: 나도 알아! 지금 여기서 물고 늘어질 생각은 없어!&n전부 준비해! 빠르게 여기를 빠져 나간다!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_115.english: Don't scatter, gather! First, to where Tenebris is—
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_115.korean: 흩어지지 말고 집결해! 일단 테네브리스가 있는 곳으로ㅡ

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_116.english: Oh no, Miss Iris! It's dangerous!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_119.english: The floor is about to collapse too!!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_12.english: In that regard, I think Yuma has the qualities to become a true leader.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_12.korean: 그런 점에 있어서 유마 씨야말로 진정한 리더가 될 자질이 있다고 생각합니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_121.english: - Shirayuri hurriedly reached out her hand, but it grasped nothing, and Iris's figure vanished into the darkness.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_121.korean: - 시라유리는 다급히 손을 내밀었지만, 그 손은 아무것도 붙잡지 못했고 어둠 속으로 이리스의 모습이 사라졌다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_122.english: Iris, if you want to play outside again, behave yourself like your older sisters.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_122.korean: 이리스, 또 밖에서 놀고 싶다면 언니들처럼 얌전히 있으렴.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_123.english: But... my friends are waiting right now...

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_124.english: You're not a child anymore. How long do you plan to keep acting like a spoiled brat?
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_124.korean: 너도 이제 어린애가 아니잖니. 언제까지 그렇게 어리광만 부릴 셈이니?

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_126.english: Just try bothering my friend one more time! If you do, I'll really kill you!
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_126.korean: 한 번만 더 내 친구 괴롭히기만 해 봐!&n그땐 정말 죽여버린다!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_127.english: I get it, I'm telling you, I get it!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_129.english: Where on earth did you learn such a nasty trick!
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_129.korean: 이런 못돼먹은 짓거리는 대체 어디서 배운 거니!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_13.english: Hmm? I thought you were sticking close to Tenebris because you were also influenced by Lord's doctrine of salvation.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_13.korean: 흐음?&n너도 로드의 구원론에 감화돼서 테네브리스 옆에 붙어 있는 줄 알았는데.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_130.english: Those guys bullied my friend Marie!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_131.english: I don't even expect you to act demure like the other older sisters. But I absolutely cannot tolerate your attitude that tarnishes the Yuma family!
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_131.korean: 다른 언니들처럼 조신하게 굴라는 건 바라지도 않아.&n하지만 유마 가문에 먹칠하는 네 태도는 도저히 용납할 수 없구나!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_132.english: What did I do so wrong!? Is protecting a friend a mistake!?
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_132.korean: 제가 뭘 그렇게 잘못했냐구요!? 친구를 지킨 게 잘못이에요!?

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_133.english: You are forbidden from going out until you reflect on your actions.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_134.english: What!? But Marie… ! I need to be by her side—
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_134.korean: 네!? 하지만 마리는…! 제가 옆에 있어야ㅡ

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_137.english: Breaking news. Today, a female student committed suicide at a high school.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_137.korean: 속보입니다. 오늘 한 고등학교에서 여학생이 자살하는 사건이 있었습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_138.english: According to rumors, the student in question continuously bullied and assaulted students from the same school…
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_138.korean: 소문에 의하면, 해당 학생은 같은 학교 학생들에게 지속적으로 괴롭힘과 폭행을…

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_139.english: Damn it… Damn it, damn it, damn it!!!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_14.english: Well, in the end, I just realized that Mr. Tenebris is nothing but a frail human.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_14.korean: 뭐, 결국 테네브리스 씨도 한낱 연약한 인간이란 걸 알게 되었을 뿐이죠.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_140.english: I didn't do anything wrong! I didn't make a mistake!!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_141.english: If I had been by her side, Marie wouldn't have died!!
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_141.korean: 내가 옆에 있었으면 마리가 죽을 일도 없었어!!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_142.english: What good is there in listening to adults?
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_142.korean: 어른들 말 들어서 좋을 게 뭐가 있어…

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_143.english: In the end, the only one you can trust is yourself.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_143.korean: 결국 마지막에 믿을 수 있는 건 자기 자신뿐이야.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_144.english: Please evacuate to a power shelter! I repeat, please evacuate to a power shelter!
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_144.korean: 전원 쉘터로 피난해 주십시오! 반복합니다, 전원 쉘터로 피난해 주십시오!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_146.english: Please evacuate to the power shelter! A gap will occur!
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_146.korean: 전원 쉘터로 피난해 주십시오! 공백이 발생합니다!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_148.english: Ah, no... Mother! Father! Sister!! Aaaah! What have I been holding back all this time for!!!
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_148.korean: 아, 아니야… 어머니! 아버지! 언니!!&n으아아아아! 내가 뭐 때문에 지금까지 참고 살았는데!!!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_149.english: How can something just vanish so meaninglessly!!
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_149.korean: 이렇게 허무하게 사라져 버리는 게 어딨어!!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_15.english: So, I hope Ms. Iris takes over this department store and solidifies her position. Then, Mr. Tenebris will surely hand over the leadership position.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_15.korean: 그러니 전 이리스 씨가 이번 백화점을 독차지해 입지를 확고히 했으면 좋겠습니다.&n그러면 테네브리스 씨도 순순히 리더의 자리를 물려주겠죠.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_150.english: I wanted to show… that I wasn't wrong…!
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_150.korean: 내가 틀리지 않았다는 걸… 보여주고 싶었는데…!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_151.english: Please evacuate to the power shelter! A gap will occur! Repeat—
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_151.korean: 전원 쉘터로 피난해 주십시오! 공백이 발생합니다! 반복합니다ㅡ

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_156.english: It's okay, it's no big deal. … What about the others?

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_157.english: All of our members are safe. For some reason, we have completely split off from the other side.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_157.korean: 저희 멤버는 다들 무사합니다.&n무슨 우연인지 저쪽과는 완전히 갈라져 버렸습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_158.english: It seems like most of the Soul Junk have also swarmed toward Tenebris.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_158.korean: 대부분의 소울정크도 테네브리스 쪽으로 몰려간 것 같아요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_159.english: Ms. Iris, this is our chance! We've already packed plenty of supplies. Let's leave right now!
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_159.korean: 이리스 씨, 이건 기회입니다! 물자는 이미 충분히 챙겼습니다.&n이대로 바로 여길 떠나죠!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_16.english: Don't get the wrong idea. I have no intention of accepting the position that bastard hands down, nor do I intend to go back to Grass Blanket Camp.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_16.korean: 착각하지 마. 난 그 자식이 물려주는 자리를 받을 생각도, 잔디이불 캠프에 다시 들어갈 생각도 없어.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_160.english: What? What about the guys up there?

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_161.english: Aren't they the ones who tried to kill us anyway? They might have intended to sacrifice us again this time!
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_161.korean: 어차피 우리를 죽이려 했던 자들 아닙니까?&n이번에도 우리를 희생시킬 생각이었을지도 모릅니다!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_162.english: It must just be that some misunderstanding caused our positions to switch. Otherwise, we would have originally been the ones fighting Soul Junk over there.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_162.korean: 뭔가 착오가 생겨 입장이 바뀐 것뿐이겠죠.&n그렇지 않다면 저쪽에서 소울정크와 맞서고 있는 게 원래는 우리였을 겁니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_163.english: Hahaha! Serves you right! You brought it upon yourself!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_164.english: … That’s right… Heave-ho… Then, let’s hurry—

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_165.english: Ah, Iris. You dropped something. Is this… a teddy bear? … It's quite torn.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_165.korean: 아, 이리스 씨. 무언가 떨어뜨리셨습니다.&n이건… 곰인형? …상당히 찢어졌군요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_17.english: … But if I were taking it by force in a legitimate way, that would be a different story.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_17.korean: …하지만 내가 정당하게 힘으로 빼앗는 거라면 얘기가 다르지.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_171.english: Do you think I'm an adult?

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_172.english: Of course! Isn't Ms. Iris someone who takes full responsibility for her decisions to the very end?
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_172.korean: 그야 당연하죠!&n이리스 씨는 자신이 정한 일에 끝까지 책임을 지시는 분 아닙니까!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_173.english: I think she is much more mature than most adults!
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_173.korean: 웬만한 어른 보다 훨씬 어른스럽다고 생각합니다!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_175.english: In that case… it can’t be helped. I guess I’ll have to take responsibility like an adult.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_175.korean: 그렇다면… 어쩔 수 없지.&n어른답게, 책임을 져야겠네.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_176.english: Mr. Tenebris! This is a big problem. The path down is completely blocked!
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_176.korean: 테네브리스 씨! 큰일입니다.&n밑으로 내려가는 길이 완전히 막혔습니다!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_177.english: Soul Junk keeps swarming in! That giant thing is completely impervious to attacks!
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_177.korean: 소울정크가 계속 몰려오고 있어요! 저 거대한 녀석, 공격이 전혀 통하지 않습니다!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_178.english: Everyone, step back! You must not fall!
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_178.korean: 모두 제 뒤로 물러서세요! 떨어지면 안 됩니다!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_179.english: What happened to the collapsed floor?

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_18.english: That's right! Exactly! That's exactly what I wanted to say!
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_18.korean: 맞습니다! 바로 그거예요!&n제가 말씀드리고 싶은 게 딱 그겁니다!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_180.english: You're wrong! That side is completely blocked too!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_182.english: I don't know! … Even if they are safe, they would have already run away! Because they are selfish guys!
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_182.korean: 모르겠습니다! …무사하다 해도 이미 도망쳤을 겁니다!&n자기밖에 모르는 녀석들이니까요!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_186.english: - The situation is the worst. That giant Soul Junk, in particular, has thick armor.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_186.korean: - 상황은 최악이다. 특히 저 거대한 소울정크는 장갑이 두터워.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_187.english: - It's difficult to cut through that armor with Tenebris's sword. Here, we need a powerful blow that can shatter it with a massive impact.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_187.korean: - 테네브리스의 검으로 저 장갑을 베어내긴 어려워. 여기서는 큰 충격으로 저 장갑을 부셔버릴 수 있는 강력한 한 방이 필요해.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_188.english: - However, the person who can pull that off here is…
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_188.korean: - 하지만, 여기서 그걸 해낼 수 있는 사람은…

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_19.english: Well, fine. Regardless of your opinion, there's no harm in looting the supplies anyway.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_19.korean: 뭐, 좋아.&n네 생각이 어쨌든 어차피 물자를 털어서 나쁠 건 없으니까.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_190.english: Step back! I need emergency treatment!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_191.english: Mr. Tenebris! We must get out of here first! We will all be wiped out here!
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_191.korean: 테네브리스 씨! 일단 이곳을 벗어나야 합니다!&n여기선 전멸합니다!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_198.english: I am the one who brought everyone here.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_199.english: As a leader, I will take responsibility... and bring everyone back safely.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_2.english: There are rumors circulating that another department store has appeared. Since no one has gone in yet, supplies must be plentiful.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_2.korean: 안 그래도 백화점이 또 하나 나타났다는 소문이 돌고 있습니다.&n아직 들어간 사람도 없으니 물자도 넉넉하겠죠.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_20.english: But… Tenebris must already know the news, right?
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_20.korean: 그런데… 테네브리스는 이미 그 소식을 알고 있겠지?

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_200.english: I'm not sure if we're included in that 'all'.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_202.english: The self-proclaimed strongest Soulworker... is kneeling and bleeding? With that, do you have the right to talk about responsibility and justice?
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_202.korean: 자칭 최강의 소울워커 님께서… 무릎 꿇고 피를 흘리고 있네?&n그래서야 책임이니 정의니 떠들 자격이 있겠어?

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_204.english: Why or not! I just came to exercise my responsibility!
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_204.korean: 어째서고 뭐고! 나도 책임이란 걸 행사하러 왔을 뿐이야!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_205.english: It's annoying that for some reason it seems like things are going according to her plan, but...
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_205.korean: 웬지 그 녀석의 뜻대로 움직이는 것 같아 짜증나긴 하지만…

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_206.english: This is just a temporary alliance this time! And just so you know, I haven't forgiven you yet, Tenebris!
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_206.korean: 이번만 임시 동맹이야!&n참고로 난 아직 널 용서한 게 아니니까 테네브리스!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_208.english: You... don't get in the way... get out of here!!!!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_209.english: That's amazing. Soul Junk, who hadn't budged from any attack, has fallen.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_209.korean: 굉장해요.&n어떤 공격에도 꿈쩍도 하지 않았던 소울정크가 쓰러졌어요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_21.english: Given the scale, it must have been conveyed. But that indecisive person wouldn't move right away.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_21.korean: 이 정도 규모면 전해졌을 겁니다.&n하지만 우유부단한 그 사람이 바로 움직일 리는 없겠죠.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_210.english: Alright, let's give it a try!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_212.english: Yes, please leave it to me.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_214.english: She will do well. She has always been like that.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_214.korean: 누나는 잘 해낼 거예요. 지금까지도 계속 그랬잖아요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_216.english: I followed you because I was worried about my older sister.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_217.english: But I was really worried. Because I felt like I wouldn't be able to meet you again...
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_217.korean: 그렇지만 정말 걱정됐는걸요. 다시는 못 만날 것 같아서…

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_218.english: But the atmosphere looks tense. You weren't trying to start a fight, were you?
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_218.korean: 그런데 분위기가 안 좋아 보이는데, 혹시 싸우려던 건 아니죠?

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_22.english: Ms. Iris, shall we leave right away then?

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_224.english: Even Tenebris would have a hard time breaking through the current situation.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_224.korean: 아무리 테네브리스라도 지금 상황을 뚫고 나가긴 힘들어.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_225.english: Shirayuri, please pass on the command on my behalf.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_225.korean: 시라유리, 나 대신 지휘 전달을 부탁해.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_23.english: Yeah, gather the troops quickly. If we move now, we'll have the advantage.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_23.korean: 응, 인원을 빠르게 모아. 지금 움직이면 우리가 유리해.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_25.english: I have absolutely no talent for fighting. It would be enough if you just included me in the group after you return.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_25.korean: 저는 싸움은 영 소질이 없어서요.&n다녀오신 뒤, 저를 그룹에 끼워만 주신다면 충분합니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_26.english: If they want to join, I’ll let them in. I don’t turn away people who come.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_28.english: - Kent… I knew you were plotting something behind the scenes, but…
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_28.korean: - 켄트… 뒤에서 뭔가를 꾸미고 있다는 건 알고 있었지만…

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_29.english: - I can't believe they would betray Tenebris so blatantly. What on earth is their goal?
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_29.korean: - 이렇게 대놓고 테네브리스를 배신할 줄이야. 목적이 대체 뭐지?

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_3.english: Ah, right. Let's assume that's true for now. But why are they coming to tell us?
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_3.korean: 아, 그래.&n우선 그 말이 사실이라 치자. 근데 그걸 왜 우리한테 와서 말하는데?

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_30.english: Oh? So there was a cute little kid in a place like this.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_30.korean: 어라? 이런 곳에 귀여운 꼬마가 있었군요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_31.english: Hmm... that's quite fascinating. It looks like a face I've seen somewhere before... It's like someone I know just got younger.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_31.korean: 흐음… 참 신기하군요.&n어디서 많이 본 얼굴인데… 마치 제가 아는 분이 어려진 것 같달까요?

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_32.english: Kent. Stay away from that kid.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_33.english: If you lay even a hand on it, I won't let you get away with it.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_35.english: Anyway… hmm… I see… I see.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_36.english: I never dreamed Yuma-san had this kind of taste—
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_36.korean: 유마 씨가 이런 취향일 줄은 꿈에도ㅡ

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_37.english: I don't mind at all if you pretend this never happened.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_37.korean: 지금 얘기 없었던 일로 해도 나는 전혀 상관없는데?

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_38.english: Ahaha, that's scary. Then I'll take my leave.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_38.korean: 아하하, 무섭군요. 그럼 전 여기서 물러나겠습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_39.english: He's still a guy whose true intentions are impossible to read...
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_39.korean: 여전히 속내를 알 수 없는 놈이야…

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_4.english: If you're Tenebris's lackey, it would be perfect to just go and tell that guy.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_4.korean: 테네브리스 따까리라면 그냥 그 자식한테 가서 말하면 딱 좋잖아.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_40.english: ...So that's how it turned out. Little kid.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_41.english: Keep a close watch on this place while I'm gone.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_41.korean: 내가 없는 동안 여기 잘 지키고 있어.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_42.english: Look at this! You were crying "Waaah!" the first time I saw you, and now you're acting all tough.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_42.korean: 요거 봐라?&n처음 봤을 때는 후에에엥~하고 울었던 주제에 늠름해진 척이나 하고 말이야.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_43.english: Hmph, I'm not afraid of anything. It's just that I'm worried about what to do when I see that guy's face again.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_43.korean: 흥, 난 무서운 게 없거든.&n단지, 싫은 녀석의 면상을 다시 봤을 때 어떻게 해야 할지 고민이야.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_44.english: I’d love to smash my fist in that face, but!
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_44.korean: 마음 같아서는 그 면상에 주먹을 박아버리고 싶지만!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_45.english: What's with the sudden change? How embarrassing...

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_46.english: Yeah, that's what I plan to do this time too.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_47.english: I won't make the wrong choice again.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_47.korean: 이젠 두 번 다시 틀린 선택을 하지 않을 거야.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_50.english: - ...This should be fine. I don't get the feeling that Iris's mental state is under any pressure either.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_50.korean: - ...이걸로 괜찮겠지. 이리스의 정신 상태도 몰려있다는 느낌은 아니야.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_51.english: - But, Kent… it’s clear he’s plotting something.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_51.korean: - 하지만, 켄트… 녀석이 뭔가를 꾸미고 있는 건 분명해.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_52.english: - Then… alright, let me join Shirayuri.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_54.english: I came to corner Yuma once again, but I didn't expect to find something so interesting.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_54.korean: 다시 한번 유마 씨를 몰아세우기 위해 찾아왔는데&n아주 흥미로운 걸 찾을 줄은 몰랐군요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_57.english: As expected, you were aiming for this place too.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_58.english: Why? Are you that upset that I came?
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_58.korean: 왜? 내가 온 게 그렇게 언짢아? ?

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_59.english: Aren't you disappointed that things went awry when you were planning to have it all to yourself?
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_59.korean: 독차지할 생각이었는데 틀어져서 아쉬운 거 아니야?

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_6.english: Well, you see, I haven't actually said anything, but I really haven't been happy with Mr. Tenebris's behavior lately.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_6.korean: 뭐, 그게 말이죠.&n사실 말은 안 했지만, 요즘 테네브리스 씨의 행동이 영 못마땅해서요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_60.english: If you intend to fight, stop it. You can't beat me with your own strength.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_60.korean: 싸울 생각이라면 그만 둬.&n네 힘으로는 날 이길 수 없어.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_61.english: If you attack us, I won't stay quiet anymore.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_61.korean: 우리를 공격한다면 나도 더는 가만히 있지 않을 거야.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_62.english: Ha! Here comes the great apostle of justice? You kept harping on about justice, justice, and now you're saying you'll just overpower them with force?
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_62.korean: 하! 대단한 정의의 사도 납셨네?&n그렇게 정의, 정의 떠들더니 결국 힘으로 제압하겠다는 거야?

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_63.english: … There probably isn't any need for further conversation.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_64.english: Yeah, I have no intention of talking to you anymore, either.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_64.korean: 그래, 나도 이제 너랑 말 섞을 생각 없어.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_65.english: Both of you, stop! Do you intend to fight right here!?
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_65.korean: 두 분 다 멈추세요! 지금 여기서 싸울 생각이신가요!?

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_66.english: Get out of the way, Shirayuri. I haven't forgotten how hard you hit me!
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_66.korean: 비켜, 시라유리.&n네가 힘껏 때린 것도 아직 안 잊었다고!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_67.english: Miss Iris, I know how you feel right now. But you can fight later. If you fight now, you will lose both supplies and people.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_67.korean: 이리스 양, 당신이 지금 어떤 기분인지는 알아요.&n하지만 싸우는 건 나중에도 할 수 있어요. 지금 싸우면 물자도, 사람도 모두 다 잃습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_68.english: How do you know how I feel—!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_7.english: After all that flirting all this time, you suddenly show up and expect me to believe it now?
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_7.korean: 지금껏 그렇게 꼬리쳐놓고 갑자기 찾아 와서는 그걸 지금 믿으라고?

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_70.korean: 꼬맹이, 네가 여기에 왜 있는 거야?

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_71.english: Where did the guy who confidently told me to leave it to him go, chasing me all the way here!?
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_71.korean: 자신 있게 맡겨달라던 녀석은 어딜 가고 여기까지 쫓아와!?

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_72.english: Hehe, since the child is saying all this... how about we let this pass peacefully just this once?
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_72.korean: 후후, 아이가 이렇게까지 말하는데… 이번만은 평화롭게 넘어가면 어떨까요?

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_73.english: Ah! Really! Alright! We can just let it slide this time!
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_73.korean: 아아! 정말! 알았어! 이번엔 조용히 넘어가면 되잖아!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_74.english: Hey kid! Go back and see! Stick right by my side and never let go!
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_74.korean: 꼬맹이! 너 돌아가서 봐!&n내 옆에 딱 붙어서 절대 떨어지지 말고!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_79.english: - Fortunately, no fight broke out between Tenebris and Iris.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_79.korean: - 다행히 테네브리스와 이리스 사이에 싸움은 벌어지지 않았다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_8.english: I thought Mr. Tenebris was ambitious.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_80.english: - After agreeing to split the supplies in half, everyone went inside the department store.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_80.korean: - 물자를 절반으로 나누어 가져가기로 약속한 뒤, 모두 백화점 안으로 들어갔다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_81.english: Ms. Iris! There is a box here too!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_82.english: There is plenty of food and medicine left, too!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_84.english: You never know. A Soul Junk might suddenly pop out like back then.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_84.korean: 그건 모르는 일이지. 그때처럼 갑자기 소울정크가 튀어나올지도 모르잖아.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_85.english: As expected, you still have it in your heart.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_86.english: Do you have any idea what we went through because of that guy?&nOf course I haven't forgotten!
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_86.korean: 그 녀석 때문에 우리가 무슨 꼴을 당했는지 알아?&n잊지 못하는 게 당연하잖아!

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_87.english: Can't you trust Mr. Tenebris just a little?
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_87.korean: 조금만 테네브리스 씨를 믿어주실 수는 없는 건가요?

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_89.english: Then, why don't you trust me?

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_9.english: I thought I could gather Desire Walkers, increase the camp's power under the pretext of 'salvation,' and dominate the void.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_9.korean: 데자이어 워커를 모으고, '구원'을 명분으로 캠프의 전력을 늘려 공백을 지배할 줄 알았죠.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_90.english: What on earth is this nonsense? I'm talking about you... You haven't forgotten how hard you hit me with that hand, have you?
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_90.korean: 이건 또 무슨 소리래?&n너 말이야... 그 손으로 날 힘껏 때린 걸 잊은 건 아니지?

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_91.english: After all, Miss Iris deserved to be punished.
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_91.korean: 그야 이리스 양이 맞을 짓을 했으니까요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_92.english: What?! Is that what you should be saying to me right now?
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_92.korean: 뭐어?! 그게 지금 나한테 할 소리야?

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_93.english: Then, what can I do for you to forgive me?

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_94.english: I don't want to get hit back by Miss Iris just like that...
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_94.korean: 제가 똑같이 이리스 양에게 한 대 맞는 건 싫으니…

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_95.english: Won't you forgive me for this?

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_97.english: Yes, you like them, don't you? Teddy bears.

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_98.english: Huh!? Why do you think I like teddy bears!?
LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_98.korean: 하아!? 내가 왜 곰인형을 좋아한다고 생각하는데!?

LastCorruptedRecord2-10OP_99.english: You were staring at me intently last time, weren't you?

LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_10.english: Deep sleep? Are you saying I'm going to die and rest in eternal sleep?
LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_10.korean: 깊은 잠이라니, 내가 죽어서 영면이라도 한다는 거야?

LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_11.english: And why are you all gathering so casually in my room again! Everyone, go back!
LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_11.korean: 그리고 왜 또 내 방에 자연스럽게 모여 있는 건데! 다들 돌아가!

LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_12.english: Don't be so hurtful. It's okay to have a little conversation before falling asleep, isn't it?
LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_12.korean: 섭섭한 소리 마세요.&n잠들기 전에 대화 정도는 괜찮잖아요?

LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_13.english: If you need it, I can lend you my coffin. It is originally for you, Master, but for Draculina, it is fine for just a little while.
LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_13.korean: 필요하다면 제 관을 빌려드릴게요.&n원래 주인님을 위한 거지만, 드라큐리나를 위해서라면 잠깐 정도는 괜찮아요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_14.english: Ah, but do you really have to return it later?
LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_14.korean: 아, 그래도 나중에 꼭 돌려주셔야 해요?

LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_15.english: You're offering to lend it to me... No, I don't need it at all in the first place!
LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_15.korean: 빌려준다니… 아니, 애초에 전혀 필요 없어!

LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_16.english: Working up a sweat all day, taking a shower, drinking some cold tomato juice, and getting eight hours of good sleep—that's all I need!
LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_16.korean: 나는 땀 흘리며 하루 일하고, 샤워한 다음 시원한 토마토 주스 마시고, 8시간 푹 자면 그걸로 충분하다고!

LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_18.english: I knew it, but... yeah, my words mean nothing... and you don't seem to have any intention of going back...
LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_18.korean: 알고는 있었지만… 응, 내 말은 아무 의미도 없구나…&n돌아갈 생각도 없어 보이고…

LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_19.english: My master has been sleeping somewhere other than his room lately.
LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_19.korean: 주인님이 요즘 방이 아닌 곳에서 주무시고 계셔요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_20.english: On top of that, it's turning into a topic I don't know again...

LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_21.english: We're friends, you know. I should at least listen to a friend's worries.

LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_22.english: I know that too! That's why I end up helping you all the time, even though I get pushed around by you guys!
LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_22.korean: 그건 나도 알아!&n그래서 매번 너희한테 휘둘리면서도 결국 도와주잖아!

LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_24.english: What's with that look in your eyes!?

LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_26.english: So what? What are you talking about?

LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_27.english: My master has been sleeping somewhere other than his room lately.
LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_27.korean: 주인님이 요즘 방이 아닌 곳에서 주무시고 계셔요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_29.english: Ah, I roughly know about that.

LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_30.english: Being inside that virtual reality game or whatever it is.
LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_30.korean: 가상 현실 게임인지 뭔지, 그 안에 들어가 있는 거.

LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_31.english: I've only heard about it so I don't know for sure, but I assume you're talking about that thing that was recently discovered.
LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_31.korean: 나도 듣기만 해서 잘은 모르지만, 최근에 발견했다는 그거 말하는 거겠지.

LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_34.english: Virtual Reality is abbreviated as VR. It refers to an artificial world that feels like it is right in front of your eyes, created using computers or machines.
LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_34.korean: 가상 현실(Virtual Reality) 줄여서 VR이라고 불러요.&n컴퓨터나 기계를 이용해 눈앞에 있는 것처럼 느끼는 인공 세계를 말하죠.

LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_36.english: Simply put, it is a technology that makes you feel like your body is here, but your gaze and senses are in another world.
LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_36.korean: 쉽게 말하면 몸은 여기 있지만, 시선과 감각은 다른 세상에 있는 것처럼 느끼게 해주는 기술이야.

LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_37.english: You had your eyes closed; I see you weren't sleeping.
LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_37.korean: 눈을 감고 계셨는데, 주무시는 게 아니었군요?

LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_38.english: It just looks like they are asleep; they are actually functioning perfectly fine in virtual reality.
LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_38.korean: 잠든 것처럼 보일 뿐, 가상 현실에서 멀쩡히 활동하고 있는 거지.

LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_40.english: I'm interested in that machine too. The commander asked me not to touch it for now, so I'm waiting, though.
LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_40.korean: 저도 그 기계엔 관심 있어요.&n사령관이 지금은 건드리지 말아 달라 부탁해서 기다리고 있지만요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_41.english: But since you said it would be fine once the work is done... Hehe, I'm so excited I might not be able to contain my excitement.
LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_41.korean: 대신 일이 끝나면 괜찮다고 했으니… 후후, 기대돼서 흥분을 참을 수 없을지도 모르겠네요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_42.english: Anyway, you don't have to worry too much.

LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_44.english: I'm telling you, I'm talking about another created world!… The story just never ends!
LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_44.korean: 그러니까 만들어진 다른 세상을 말하는 거라니까!&n…이야기가 도대체 끝나질 않네!

LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_45.english: - Thanks to Vargr and Hela, I was able to clear the second record.
LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_45.korean: - 바르그와 헬라 덕분에 두 번째 기록까지 클리어할 수 있었어.

LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_46.english: - Next, is it time to look at the third record... But just how many are there?
LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_46.korean: - 이어서 세 번째 기록을 열람할 차례인가… 그런데 대체 몇 개까지 있는 거지?

LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_47.english: - A bioroid created by Lion Corporation…

LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_48.english: - I suppose you're talking about those kids I met in virtual reality.
LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_48.korean: - 역시 가상 현실에서 만났던 그 애들을 말하는 거겠지.

LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_49.english: - I wish things would go as well as they did with Leanne...
LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_49.korean: - 리앤 때처럼 잘 풀리면 좋을 텐데…

LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_55.english: I was getting ready to go in.

LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_56.english: I was created to serve you, Master, from cradle to grave, and into the eternal afterlife after closing my eyes.
LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_56.korean: 저는 요람에서 무덤까지, 그리고 눈을 감은 이후의 영원한 사후 세계까지 주인님을 섬기기 위해 만들어졌어요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_57.english: So, Master, I want to know about that 'afterlife' where you close your eyes and leave...
LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_57.korean: 그러니까 주인님께서 눈을 감고 떠나는 그 ‘사후 세계’를… 알고 싶어요

LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_58.english: - An afterlife you leave with your eyes closed…?

LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_61.english: Yes, it's alright. As long as I can go with you, Master, anywhere... any place... I will protect you.
LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_61.korean: 네, 괜찮아요.&n주인님과 함께 갈 수만 있다면, 어디든… 어떤 곳이든… 제가 지켜드릴게요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_62.english: Welcome, Commander. I have finished preparing to connect to virtual reality.
LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_62.korean: 어서 오세요, 사령관.&n가상 현실에 접속할 준비는 다 끝내놨어요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_64.english: Dragon has other business today, so I’ve decided to help in her place.
LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_64.korean: 닥터 양이라면 오늘은 다른 용무가 있어서, 제가 대신 도와드리기로 했어요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_66.english: Azaz, I want to sleep with you, Master.
LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_66.korean: 아자즈, 저도 주인님과 같이 잠들고 싶어요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_67.english: Yes, of course. I anticipated that, so I've already prepared it.
LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_67.korean: 네, 물론이에요.&n그럴 줄 알고 이미 준비해 두었어요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_7.english: I heard that Draculina has fallen into a deep sleep.

LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_70.english: Because today, I will only look.

LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_71.english: - Really? I can trust you, right... Azaz? Because I really do trust you??
LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_71.korean: - 정말이지? 믿어도 되는 거지... 아자즈? 정말로 믿고 있으니까??

LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_72.english: - As I put on the helmet and lay down, Eternity stood there blankly, holding the helmet as if she didn't know how to put it on properly.
LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_72.korean: - 내가 헬멧을 착용하고 자리에 눕자, 이터니티는 착용 방법을 잘 모르는 듯 날 따라 헬멧을 들고 멀뚱멀뚱 서 있었다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_74.english: - After putting the helmet on Eternity, I slowly laid her down next to where I was going to lie.
LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_74.korean: - 나는 이터니티에게 헬멧을 씌워준 뒤 내가 누울 자리 옆에 천천히 눕혔다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_75.english: Ah... um... shall I sing you a lullaby...?

LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_77.english: - Just then, the lights in the server room went out. It seems Azaz discreetly turned them off.
LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_77.korean: - 그때 서버실의 불이 꺼졌다. 아자즈가 눈치 있게 꺼준 모양이다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_78.english: - Soon, I felt Eternity's touch, and she slowly wrapped her arms around me.
LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_78.korean: - 곧 이터니티의 손길이 느껴지더니, 내 몸을 천천히 감싸 안았다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_79.english: I felt like I could go anywhere if I walked holding your hand.
LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_79.korean: 그대 손을 잡고 걸으면&n어디라도 갈 수 있을 것만 같았는데

LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_8.english: Thank you for letting me know.

LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_80.english: Now, it has all become a story of the past.

LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_81.english: - The sense of relief and warmth of Eternity that feels as always.

LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_82.english: - Soft skin and a sweet fragrance envelop the whole body.
LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_82.korean: - 부드러운 살결과 달콤한 향기가 온몸을 감싼다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_83.english: - When you are held like this, tension is released reflexively, and the body reacts automatically.
LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_83.korean: - 이렇게 안기면 반사적으로 긴장이 풀리고, 몸은 저절로 반응한다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_84.english: - And the sound of Eternity's lullaby-like singing could be heard clearly. Within it, as always, her affection was fully contained.
LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_84.korean: - 그리고 선명하게 들려오는 이터니티의 자장가 같은 노랫소리. 그 속에는 언제나처럼 그녀의 애정이 고스란히 담겨 있었다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_85.english: - I listened to that pleasant song for a moment and slowly closed my eyes.
LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_85.korean: - 나는 잠시 그 기분 좋은 노래를 들으며, 천천히 눈을 감았다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_87.english: Do you have something you want with me...?

LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_88.english: Ah, are you perhaps talking about virtual reality games?
LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_88.korean: 아, 혹시 가상 현실 게임을 말하는 거야?

LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_89.english: It's not that great of a place. Is that okay?
LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_89.korean: 그렇게 좋은 곳은 아니야. 그래도 괜찮아?

LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_92.english: As expected, I feel relieved having Eternity by my side.

LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_93.english: I'm not sleeping, but... that's not bad either.
LastCorruptedRecord2-1ED_93.korean: 잠을 자는 건 아니지만… 그것도 나쁘진 않네.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2ED_1.english: - The back-and-forth between the two continued for a while…

LastCorruptedRecord2-2ED_10.english: Let go! Let go of this!

LastCorruptedRecord2-2ED_11.english: Please stay still. If you struggle like that

LastCorruptedRecord2-2ED_13.english: … She struggled, hit her head on the coffin, and just fainted.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2ED_14.english: This might be better than letting it run wild.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2ED_14.korean: 날뛰게 두는 것보단 이 편이 나을지도 모르지.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2ED_16.english: Master, shall I put it in a coffin?

LastCorruptedRecord2-2ED_18.english: Thanks to my master's instructions, I was able to avoid serious injury.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2ED_18.korean: 주인님 지시 덕분에 큰 상처는 피할 수 있었어요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2ED_19.english: - Thanks to Eternity, we succeeded in safely subduing it.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2ED_2.english: - With Eternity's decisive blow, the signal for the end sounded.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2ED_2.korean: - 이터니티의 결정적 타격으로 그 끝을 알리는 신호가 울렸다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2ED_20.english: - But I feel like the real beginning starts now.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2ED_20.korean: - 하지만 이제부터가 진짜 시작이라는 기분이 든다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2ED_21.english: - Will they really be able to safely retrieve it from Desire's grasp this time as well...?
LastCorruptedRecord2-2ED_21.korean: - 이번에도 과연, 데자이어의 손아귀로부터 무사히 되돌릴 수 있을까…?

LastCorruptedRecord2-2ED_22.english: I'm not dead, so please don't do that...

LastCorruptedRecord2-2ED_24.english: Still, just in case, let's get treated first when we return to camp.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2ED_24.korean: 그래도 혹시 모르니 캠프로 돌아가면 치료부터 받자.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2ED_4.english: Haha… Ahahahaha! Great! This smell of blood filling my mouth… It’s been so long!
LastCorruptedRecord2-2ED_4.korean: 하하… 아하하하하! 좋아! 입안 가득 번지는 이 피 냄새… 정말 오랜만이에요!

LastCorruptedRecord2-2ED_5.english: Alright, this is the last one! Go ahead and kill me!
LastCorruptedRecord2-2ED_5.korean: 자, 이제 마지막이에요! 어서 절 죽여 보세요!

LastCorruptedRecord2-2ED_6.english: You are already not in a condition to fight properly. You can't even move your arms properly.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2ED_6.korean: 당신은 이미 제대로 싸울 수 있는 상태가 아니에요.&n팔조차 제대로 움직이지 못하고 있어요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2ED_7.english: What do you know to be talking so recklessly! Nothing is over yet!
LastCorruptedRecord2-2ED_7.korean: 뭘 안다고 멋대로 떠드는 거죠! 아직 아무것도 끝나지 않았어요!

LastCorruptedRecord2-2ED_8.english: I'll take you to your master just like this.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2ED_9.english: Don't make me laugh…! I still…! Ugh…!

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_1.english: - Is this… not a blank space?

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_10.english: Yes, I am also happy to have you by my side, Master.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_10.korean: 네, 저도 주인님이 곁에 계셔서 행복해요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_100.english: Well, I have no intention of dealing with someone who is obviously going to run away. After all, there is nothing more annoying than having things cut off in the middle of having fun.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_100.korean: 뭐, 도망칠 게 뻔한 인간을 상대할 생각은 없지만 말이죠.&n한창 즐기는 도중에 끊기는 것만큼 짜증나는 일도 없으니까요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_102.english: … I’ll be going now. I have prey ahead of me.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_102.korean: …전 이만 가보겠습니다. 앞에 쫓는 사냥감이 있답니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_107.english: You're more persistent than I thought. If you value your life, get out of my sight right now.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_107.korean: 생각보다 끈질기군요.&n목숨이 아깝다면 당장 내 눈앞에서 사라지시죠.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_108.english: I don't have time for someone who ends up dead after a single cut. Believe it or not, I'm a busy person.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_108.korean: 한 번 베이면 그걸로 끝나는 인간에게 내어줄 시간은 없답니다.&n이래 봬도 바쁜 몸이라서요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_109.english: Judging by the looks of it… you are a moth just learning to flap its wings and running wild. It seems you looked down on others just because you had climbed a little higher, and have even forgotten your own weakness.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_109.korean: 보아하니… 막 날갯짓을 배우고 설치는 나방이군요.&n조금 높이 올랐다고 남을 내려보다가, 제 나약함마저 잊어버린 모양이지요

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_11.english: This very moment I spend laughing with my Master... is the most precious to me.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_11.korean: 주인님과 함께 웃으며 보내는 지금 이 순간이… 저에게는 가장 소중해요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_110.english: - What should I do...? We're not communicating as well as I thought. But I can't just let it go like this.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_110.korean: - 어떡하지…? 생각보다 대화가 안 통해. 그렇다고 이대로 보낼 수는 없어.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_111.english: - Do I have to subdue it here...?
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_111.korean: - 여기서는 한 번 제압을 해야 하나…?

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_115.english: What exactly are you trying to do since earlier?
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_115.korean: 당신은… 아까부터 계속 뭐 하자는 거죠?

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_116.english: With such strange attire, calling me "Master"? Is this a maid game?

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_117.english: You aren't normal either, carrying a maid like this around.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_117.korean: 이런 메이드를 데리고 다니는 당신도 정상은 아니군요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_119.english: Did you just tell me to cancel? I'm sorry, but... I guess I won't be able to.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_119.korean: 당신, 방금 취소하라 했습니까?&n안타깝지만… 그러지 못하겠군요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_120.english: I didn't lie. No matter how I look at it, you only seem like a weak man.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_120.korean: 저는 거짓을 말하지 않았습니다.&n아무리 봐도 나약한 남자로밖에 안 보이는데요?

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_121.english: If you won't cancel... I'll prove it.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_124.english: Okay, I’m getting a little interested. He’s a much more interesting opponent than the ones I’ve fought so far.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_124.korean: 좋아요, 조금은 흥미가 생겼어요.&n지금까지 싸워온 것보다는 훨씬 흥미로운 상대군요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_125.english: This place is cramped, so let's change locations. There is a better battlefield up ahead.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_125.korean: 이곳은 비좁으니 장소를 바꾸죠.&n앞에 더 좋은 싸움터가 있답니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_126.english: I'll be waiting there... so go ahead and prove it to me!
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_126.korean: 거기서 기다리고 있을 테니… 어디 한 번 증명해 보시죠!

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_129.english: No. Even if I had stepped forward, the result certainly wouldn't have been much different.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_129.korean: 아닙니다.&n분명 제가 나섰어도 결과는 크게 다르지 않았을 겁니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_130.english: Hmm... but isn't it not absolutely necessary to chase after them? It's not like they are causing us any harm right now.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_130.korean: 흐음… 그런데 꼭 쫓아갈 필요는 없지 않습니까?&n지금 당장 저희에게 피해를 주는 것도 아니고요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_131.english: Maybe that is the case for now. Because it doesn't seem like it has been completely consumed by Desire yet.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_131.korean: 지금은 그럴지도 모르지.&n아직 데자이어에 완전히 잠식된 것 같진 않으니까.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_132.english: But if you are eventually consumed by desire, even what little reason you have left will vanish. By then, it will be too late.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_132.korean: 하지만 언젠가 욕망에 잡아먹히면, 그때는 남아 있는 이성마저 사라질 거야.&n그때가 되면 늦어.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_133.english: Well, at least it seems we can communicate, so I suppose that’s a relief. Oh, and of course, I’ll just be cheering you on from behind, Neve!
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_133.korean: 뭐, 말은 통하는 것 같으니 그나마 다행이라면 다행이군요.&n아, 물론 저는 네브 씨 뒤에서 열심히 응원만 하겠습니다!

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_134.english: - It is certain that that girl is the protagonist of the third record.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_134.korean: - 저 소녀가 세 번째 기록의 주인공이라는 건 확실해.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_135.english: - We ended up fighting in the end... but first, let's figure out what kind of person she is.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_135.korean: - 결국 싸우게 됐지만… 일단 어떤 애인지 파악하자.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_137.english: I have a favor to ask.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_139.english: I gave my permission because their resolve was so firm, but... honestly, I'm worried.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_139.korean: 의지가 너무 확고해서 허락하긴 했습니다만… 솔직히 걱정이 되는군요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_140.english: Do you believe that because she is strong?

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_141.english: - So I have to believe you too.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_142.english: … As expected, it turned out this way. Though I did anticipate it.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_144.english: But wouldn't doing this actually prove that your master is weak?
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_144.korean: 하지만 이래서는 오히려 당신 주인이 나약하다는 걸 증명하는 꼴이지 않겠어요?

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_145.english: It essentially means sending the maid out alone like this.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_146.english: Master is much stronger than me.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_147.english: That person? He didn't look like that.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_148.english: Even if everyone ganged up on him, they couldn't defeat Master.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_148.korean: 모두가 달려들어도 주인님을 이길 수 없었어요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_15.english: Mr. Nev, how long do we have to keep doing this?
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_15.korean: 네브 씨, 저희 언제까지 이러고 있어야 합니까?

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_150.english: No matter how many times I confronted it, it didn't subside at all.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_150.korean: 몇 번을 맞서도, 전혀 수그러들지 않았어요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_152.english: So, Master, you are absolutely not weak.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_153.korean: 지, 지금 무슨 소리를 하시는 거죠!?

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_154.english: It is exactly as it says. It means that Master is not weak.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_154.korean: 말 그대로예요. 주인님은 나약하지 않다는 뜻이에요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_155.english: The weakness I was talking about isn't that kind of thing!
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_155.korean: 제가 말한 나약함은 그런 걸 말하는 게 아니에요!

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_156.english: Honestly… talking to you makes me feel like a fool. To think you would blurt out such blasphemous words so casually…
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_156.korean: 정말이지… 당신과 얘기하다 보면 제가 다 바보가 되는 기분이군요.&n그런 불경한 말을 아무렇지도 않게 내뱉다니…

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_157.english: Well, fine. It doesn't really matter. After all, it is true that I have become interested in you.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_157.korean: 뭐, 좋아요. 아무래도 상관없습니다.&n당신에게 흥미가 생긴 건 사실이니까요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_158.english: Alright, bring it on! I can take you on anytime!
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_158.korean: 자아, 덤벼보시죠!&n전 얼마든지 상대해 드릴 수 있답니다!

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_16.english: It is clear that it is not the case, at least not now.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_161.english: That's a relief... I was worried that Eternity might have disappeared.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_162.english: Thank you, Eternity. For being by my side.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_164.english: … How long have the two of you been there?

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_166.english: Come to think of it, are Hela and Stella doing well?
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_166.korean: 그러고 보니, 헬라와 스텔라는 잘 지내고 있어?

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_167.english: Who do you mean? I'm talking about the two people I met a while ago.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_167.korean: 누구냐니? 얼마 전에 만난 두 사람 말이야.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_168.english: I'm not an enemy. Please think of me as being on the same side.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_168.korean: 적은 아니야. 같은 편이라고 생각해 줘.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_169.english: Is Soul Junk related to Desire Walker?
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_169.korean: 소울정크는 데자이어 워커와 관련이 있는 거야?

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_17.english: Of course, that was even before the two of you were lost in your own world!
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_17.korean: 물론 두 분께서 ‘둘만의 세계’에 빠져 계시기 전부터죠!

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_170.english: I hope a big battle doesn't break out...

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_172.english: Uh... um... he's a bit... peculiar.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_173.english: Anyway, it looks certain that it is Desire Walker... what are you going to do?
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_173.korean: 어쨌든 데자이어 워커라는 건 확실해 보이는데… 어떻게 할 거야?

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_174.english: Is it possible to have a calm conversation?

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_175.english: About the conversation with that girl. Is it okay if I talk to her?
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_175.korean: 저 소녀와 대화 말이야. 내가 해도 괜찮을까?

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_176.english: I know it's dangerous. But I want to talk to them directly.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_176.korean: 위험하다는 건 알아. 하지만 직접 대화를 해보고 싶어.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_177.english: And no matter what happens, Eternity will protect you.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_177.korean: 그리고 만약 무슨 일이 있어도 이터니티가 지켜줄 테니까.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_178.english: I will do my best to live up to your expectations.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_178.korean: 그 기대에 보답할 수 있도록 할게.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_179.english: We want to talk to you, even if it's just for a moment.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_179.korean: 잠깐이라도 좋으니 우리는 너와 이야기를 하고 싶어.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_18.english: It seems like Miss Eternity noticed us from the beginning, though.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_18.korean: ‘이터니티 양’은 처음부터 저희를 눈치채고 계셨던 것 같지만 말이죠.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_180.english: If you want to fight Soul Junk, we can help you.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_180.korean: 소울정크와 싸우고 싶다면 우리가 도와줄 수도 있어.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_182.english: … Anyway, we just want to talk to you.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_182.korean: …아무튼, 우리는 너와 대화를 하고 싶을 뿐이야.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_183.english: I think we'll have to fight in the end.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_184.english: Sorry for saying that so confidently.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_186.english: It’s not that I’m not worried, either.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_186.korean: 나도 걱정이 안 되는 건 아니야.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_187.english: But I believe Eternity will be fine.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_19.english: Commander, we are here to investigate the movements of the Soul Junk. If possible… we would appreciate it if you could handle that when it is just the two of you.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_19.korean: 사령관 씨, 저희는 소울정크들의 움직임을 조사하러 나왔습니다.&n가능하다면… 그런 건 둘만 계실 때 해주셨으면 합니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_2.english: - Fortunately, it looks like you made it in properly without falling asleep.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_2.korean: - 다행히 잠들지 않고 제대로 들어온 모양이네.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_20.english: Oh? What is it, Mr. Nev? Are you perhaps jealous? Then Miriam will be sad.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_20.korean: 호오? 뭡니까 네브 씨, 혹시 질투라도 하시는 겁니까?&n그럼 미리엄 씨가 슬퍼할 텐데요?

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_21.english: Kent, it's not like that. And don't say anything to Miriam.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_21.korean: 켄트, 그런 거 아니야.&n그리고 미리엄에게는 아무 말도 하지 마.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_22.english: Hahaha! Don't worry, I have that much common sense! Well, though, that situation does seem like it would be quite fun!
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_22.korean: 하하하! 걱정 마세요, 저도 그 정도 눈치는 있습니다!&n뭐, 그래도 그 상황은 꽤 재미있을 것 같긴 하지만요!

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_24.english: - … What is going on and how?

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_25.english: - I came back in for the first time after clearing the second record…
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_25.korean: - 난 두 번째 기록을 클리어하고 나서 처음으로 다시 들어왔는데…

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_26.english: - We never agreed to investigate Soul Junk with these two people.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_26.korean: - 이 두 사람과 소울정크를 조사하기로 한 적은 없잖아.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_27.english: - But the atmosphere right now feels like I’ve stepped into a story that has been going on for a long time.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_27.korean: - 그런데 지금 분위기는 마치 원래부터 이어지던 이야기 속에 끼어든 것 같은 느낌이야.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_29.english: - Kent just saw Eternity and called her 'Miss Eternity'.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_29.korean: - 켄트는 방금 이터니티를 보고 ‘이터니티 양’이라고 불렀어.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_3.english: - Eternity's embrace was so warm that I almost fell asleep right there...
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_3.korean: - 이터니티의 품이 너무 따뜻해서 하마터면 그대로 잠들 뻔했어…

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_30.english: - However, in the second record, it was Hela who met these two, not Eternity.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_30.korean: - 하지만 두 번째 기록에서 이 둘과 만난 건 헬라였지, 이터니티가 아니야.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_31.english: - But how do you know about the existence of Eternity?
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_31.korean: - 그런데 어떻게 이터니티의 존재를 알고 있는 거지?

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_33.english: Hela? Stella…? Who are you talking about?

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_34.english: It's the first time I've heard that name. Kent, have you ever heard of it?
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_34.korean: 처음 듣는 이름입니다.&n켄트 너는 들어본 적 있어?

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_35.english: No, I'm hearing it for the first time, too. None of the people who recently joined the camp had such a name.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_35.korean: 아뇨, 저도 처음 듣습니다.&n최근 캠프에 합류한 사람들 중엔 그런 이름을 가진 자는 없었습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_36.english: Are you sure you haven't mistaken me for someone else?
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_36.korean: 혹시 다른 사람과 착각하신 거 아닙니까?

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_37.english: - As expected… the information the two of them know has changed.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_37.korean: - 역시… 두 사람이 알고 있는 정보가 변해 있다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_38.english: - I don't know if it's intentional, but each record might not be connected to the others, but rather start individually.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_38.korean: - 의도된 건지 모르겠지만, 각각의 기록은 서로 이어지는 게 아니라 개별적으로 시작되는 걸지도 몰라.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_39.english: - But seeing that only my information is preserved… it feels strongly like it was intentionally designed.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_39.korean: - 하지만 내 정보만은 유지되는 걸 보면… 뭔가 의도적으로 설계된 느낌이 강해.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_4.english: - Oh, right! Eternity…! Surely she didn't fall again like Hela, did she?
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_4.korean: - 아, 맞다! 이터니티…! 설마 이번에도 헬라처럼 떨어진 건 아니겠지?

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_41.english: Yes, I understand. If it doesn't cause you any harm... I won't go out of my way to remove it.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_41.korean: 네, 알겠어요.&n주인님께 해가 되지 않는다면… 굳이 제거하진 않을게요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_42.english: - Looking only at me even in a situation like this... I guess I should say that’s typical of Eternity... It must be the first time she’s looked at someone other than me, so isn’t she surprised?
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_42.korean: - 이런 상황에서도 오직 나만 바라보는 건, 역시 이터니티답다고 해야 할까…&n나 말고 다른 사람을 보는 건 처음일텐데 놀라진 않는 건가?

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_43.english: Alright then, let's start the investigation again! If my prediction is correct... this investigation will by no means be easy.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_43.korean: 자, 그럼 다시 조사를 시작하죠!&n제 예상이 맞다면… 이번 조사는 결코 쉽지 않을 겁니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_44.english: Anyway, there are an insane number of Soul Junk today. Hehe... I wonder if a human slaughter party broke out nearby?
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_44.korean: 그나저나 오늘따라 소울정크가 엄청나게 많군요.&n큭큭… 근처에서 인간 살육 파티라도 벌어진 건 아닐까요?

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_45.english: Kent… don’t say things like that, even as a joke. It’s certainly true that there is more than usual, but…
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_45.korean: 켄트… 농담이라도 그런 말은 하지 마.&n확실히 여느 때보다 많은 건 사실이지만…

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_46.english: I do know exactly when Soul Junk gathers like this... but... I just hope it's not.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_46.korean: 이렇게 소울정크가 모이는 때가 언제인지 딱 하나 알고 있긴 한데…&n…아니었으면 하는 마음뿐이야.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_47.english: You mean when Desire Walker is nearby, right?
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_47.korean: 데자이어 워커가 근처에 있을 때 말씀이시죠?

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_48.english: - Desire Walker… Then does that mean the owner of the third record is nearby?
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_48.korean: - 데자이어 워커… 그렇다면 세 번째 기록의 주인이 근처에 있다는 건가?

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_49.english: That is correct. The Desire Energy emitted by Desire Walkers is the ultimate prey for Soul Junk.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_49.korean: 그렇습니다.&n데자이어 워커가 방출하는 데자이어 에너지는 소울정크에겐 최고의 먹잇감이거든요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_50.english: Of course, usually the opposite happens.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_50.korean: 물론, 대개는 반대로 먹히는 쪽이 되지만요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_51.english: I will make sure no one harms my master.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_51.korean: 그 누구도 주인님에게 해를 끼치지 못하게 할 거예요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_52.english: I will definitely protect you, Master, so please do not worry.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_52.korean: 주인님은 제가 반드시 지켜드릴 테니 걱정하지 말아주세요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_53.english: Wow, that sounds like something out of a romance drama! You're so lucky, Commander!
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_53.korean: 이야~ 로맨스 드라마에서나 나올 법한 멘트로군요!&n좋으시겠네요, 사령관 씨!

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_55.english: Enough small talk. Let's hurry and get started with the investigation. For some reason... I have a bad feeling...
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_55.korean: 잡담은 여기까지. 서둘러 조사를 시작하자.&n왠지… 안 좋은 예감이 들어…

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_56.english: Shh... I think it's over there.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_57.english: A giant scythe… If it is a weapon handled only by Walkers, it is highly likely to be a Desire Walker.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_57.korean: 거대한 낫…&n워커들만 다루는 무기라면, 데자이어 워커일 가능성이 매우 높군요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_61.english: Why are you making such a fuss over just one leg? You can still move!
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_61.korean: 고작 다리 하나 잘린 거 가지고 왜 그러시죠? 아직 더 움직일 수 있잖아요!

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_62.english: Now, crawl around miserably, scattering filthy black blood! If you reattach your legs, I'll just cut them off again!
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_62.korean: 자, 더러운 검은 피를 흩뿌리면서 비참하게 기어다녀 보세요!&n다리를 붙이면 다시 베어드리면 되니까요!

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_64.english: - … The girl who appeared to be a Desire Walker was literally slaughtering the surrounding Soul Junk.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_64.korean: - …데자이어 워커로 보이는 소녀는 주변의 소울정크를 그야말로 학살하고 있었다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_65.english: Commander! You must not disparage others carelessly!
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_65.korean: 사령관 씨! 남을 함부로 비하하면 안 됩니다!

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_67.english: - I think that expression is even harsher...
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_67.korean: - 그 표현이 더 심한 거 같은데…

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_68.english: No matter what expression you use, it is clearly not a normal state. After all, Desire Energy eventually drives a person's reason insane.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_68.korean: 무슨 표현을 쓰든 정상적인 상태가 아닌 건 분명해.&n데자이어 에너지는 결국 사람의 이성을 미치게 만들어 버리니까.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_69.english: - The situation is the worst on record so far. It might be even worse than today.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_69.korean: - 상황은 지금까지의 기록 중 최악이야. 하루 때보다 더 심할지도 모르겠어.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_7.english: - Eternity approached me and held my hands tightly. A warmth was conveyed, as if to reassure me.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_7.korean: - 이터니티는 나에게 다가와 두 손을 꼭 잡았다. 안심하라는 듯 따뜻함이 전해졌다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_70.english: I plan to talk to them first.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_71.english: Are you seriously talking while pointing weapons at each other? That's cool! You're really cool, Mr. Nev!
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_71.korean: 설마 무기를 맞대며 얘기하는 겁니까?&n멋지군요! 정말 멋져요 네브 씨!

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_72.english: I'm just going to strike up a normal conversation. I don't intend to try anything special.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_72.korean: 그냥 평범하게 말을 걸 거야. 특별히 뭔가를 더 시도할 생각은 없어.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_73.english: Wait here for now. I have a bad feeling about this.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_73.korean: 일단 여기서 기다리고 있어. 느낌이 좋지 않아.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_74.english: You are absolutely right. If we step forward together, it seems we might just lose our heads for no reason.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_74.korean: 지당하신 말씀입니다. 같이 나섰다간 괜히 목만 날아갈 것 같군요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_75.english: Or… we could just give up and go back to camp. They aren't exactly coming our way, and it looks too dangerous.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_75.korean: 아니면… 그냥 포기하고 캠프로 돌아갈 수도 있습니다.&n딱히 저희 쪽으로 오는 것도 아니고, 너무 위험해 보입니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_76.english: If I don't stop this here, someone else will be in danger just the same. I have to stop this before more damage occurs.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_76.korean: 여기서 막지 않으면, 다른 누군가가 위험에 처하는 건 마찬가지야.&n더 많은 피해가 나오기 전에 내가 멈춰야 해.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_77.english: The strong protect the weak… Hehe, you are always amazing, Mr. Nev.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_77.korean: 힘 있는 자가 약자를 지킨다… 후후, 언제나 대단하십니다, 네브 씨.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_78.english: I'm not trying to act cool, so don't flatter me. I'll be right back. Just wait here quietly.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_78.korean: 폼 잡을 생각 없으니까 치켜세우지 마.&n일단 다녀올게, 여기서 조용히 기다리고 있어.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_8.english: I will never leave my master's side, anytime, anywhere.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_8.korean: 저는 언제 어디서나 주인님 곁을 떠나지 않을 거예요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_80.english: What? You mean the Commander? That is…

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_82.english: I will definitely protect you, Master.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_84.english: It looks like it won't do any good to try and stop it this time either.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_85.english: I don't know why, but... Commander, I feel that I can trust you with this.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_85.korean: 이유는 모르겠지만… 사령관 씨, 당신에게라면 믿고 맡겨도 괜찮을 거라는 생각이 듭니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_86.english: Understood. Then, I will leave it to you.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_88.english: Commander! Don't worry! If anything happens, I'll rush to camp and call for backup!
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_88.korean: 사령관 씨! 걱정 마세요!&n만약 무슨 일이 생기면 제가 바로 캠프로 달려가 지원을 부르겠습니다!

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_89.english: … I guess I don't need to worry about it.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_91.english: So these are the people who have been following us for a while.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_92.english: I don't know who you are, but I have no interest in you. I'm in the middle of having fun, so please don't disturb me.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_92.korean: 누구신지는 모르겠지만, 당신들에게는 관심 없답니다.&n한창 즐기던 중이니 방해하지 마시죠.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_93.english: Raising your voice... I can't tell if that's courageous or just ignorant.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_93.korean: 언성을 높이다니… 용기 있는 건지, 단순히 무지한 건지 알 수 없군요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_94.english: Normally I would have chopped off that arrogant neck... but let's just go today.
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_94.korean: 평소 같으면 그 잘난 목을 잘라냈겠지만…&n오늘은 그냥 가도록 하죠.

LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_99.english: You guys? How ridiculous. Besides, I don't exactly fight only Soul Junk, you know?
LastCorruptedRecord2-2OP_99.korean: 당신들이? 우습군요.&n게다가 저는 딱히 소울정크와만 싸우지 않는 답니다?

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_1.english: - We returned to the Grass Blanket Camp with the unconscious girl.
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_1.korean: - 기절한 소녀를 데리고 우리는 잔디이불 캠프로 돌아왔다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_10.english: Hmm... but Mr. Nev, are you really okay? If 'that kid' sees this, it looks like it's going to get quite noisy.
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_10.korean: 흠… 그런데 네브 씨, 정말 괜찮은 겁니까?&n만약 '그 아이'가 보면 꽤 시끄러워질 것 같은데요?

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_100.english: Have you run out of things to say already?

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_101.english: Lily, may I ask you just one thing?
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_101.korean: 릴리 님, 한 가지만 여쭤도 될까요?

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_102.english: Yes, please do as you please.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_103.english: Do you… think you are alone?

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_104.english: I wondered what kind of question you were going to ask…

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_105.english: As you can see, I am alone. Because, like you, there is no one to spend my life with, nor anyone to die with... 'right now'.
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_105.korean: 보시다시피, 저는 혼자입니다.&n당신처럼 평생을 함께할 이도, 죽음을 같이할 이도… ‘지금은’ 없으니까요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_106.english: That's enough. Let's end this trivial conversation.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_107.english: Ah, if you want a fight…

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_109.english: Thank you for your hard work.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_110.english: For now, it seems we have no choice but to continue the conversation and wait. If you are a Desire Worker, surely you must have at least one desire of your own.
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_110.korean: 지금은 대화를 이어가며 기다릴 수밖에 없을 것 같습니다.&n데자이어 워커라면 분명, 자신만의 욕망이 하나쯤은 있을 테지요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_111.english: That… I can’t be sure yet, but I think it will be different.
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_111.korean: 그건… 아직 확신할 순 없지만, 저는 다를 거라 생각합니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_112.english: Anyway, thank you for your hard work. Please leave this to me and get some rest, Commander.
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_112.korean: 아무튼, 수고 많으셨습니다.&n여기는 저에게 맡기고 사령관님은 편히 쉬시기 바랍니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_115.english: - But that's strange. If desire definitely exists, you would have to be alive to fulfill it...
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_115.korean: - 하지만 이상한데? 욕망이란 게 반드시 존재한다면, 그것을 이루기 위해선 살아 있어야 할 텐데…

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_116.english: - Even so, Lily keeps repeating the word 'kill' so easily...
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_116.korean: - 그런데도 릴리는 너무 쉽게 ‘죽이라’는 말을 반복하고 있어…

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_119.english: Yes, Lily and I look alike.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_12.english: You say it's going to be quite noisy? Are you talking about me?
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_12.korean: 꽤 시끄러울 거라니? 지금 날 두고 하는 소리야?

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_120.english: To be precise... it resembles another Eternity, not me...
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_120.korean: 정확히는... 제가 아닌, 다른 이터니티와 닮았습니다…
