LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_122.english: I have never seen it firsthand, but I know the end that the Eternities met before the apocalypse.
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_122.korean: 직접 본 적은 없지만, 멸망전의 이터니티들이 맞이했던 최후를 저는 알고 있어요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_123.english: Yes. But that isn't all. I know of another ending as well.
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_123.korean: 네. 하지만 그것만이 아니에요.&n저는 또 다른 최후도 알고 있어요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_125.english: This is the end of the Eternities who survived, unable to protect their master or even enter the coffin with him.
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_125.korean: 주인을 지켜내지 못하고, 함께 관에 들어가지도 못한 채… 살아남아 버린 이터니티들의 최후입니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_126.english: - The next day, I headed to the basement with Eternity to talk to Lily again.
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_126.korean: - 다음 날, 나는 이터니티와 함께 다시 릴리와 대화하기 위해 지하실로 향했다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_128.english: Are you really sure that method is okay?

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_13.english: Oops, speak of the devil and he appears...
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_13.korean: 어이쿠, 호랑이도 제 말 하면 온다더니…

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_132.english: Did you sleep well last night?

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_133.english: You know this well, don't you? For workers, 'deep sleep' is just a choice.
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_133.korean: 당신도 잘 알지 않나요?&n워커들에게 ‘숙면’은 그저 선택일 뿐이랍니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_134.english: You didn't come just to check on me, did you? What do you want?
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_134.korean: 안부나 확인하기 위해 찾아온 건 아닐 테지요?&n무슨 용무시죠?

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_136.english: If you want… I’ll fight for you.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_140.english: That's only natural. I'm not a god, so how could I know everything?
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_140.korean: 그건 당연한 거야. 신도 아닌데 어떻게 모든 걸 알 수 있겠어.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_141.english: Even if you make the wrong choice… don't doubt yourself.
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_141.korean: 설령 잘못된 선택을 하더라도… 스스로를 의심하지는 마.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_142.english: You're the leader of this camp, aren't you? If you waver, everyone gets anxious.
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_142.korean: 너는 이 캠프의 리더잖아? 네가 흔들리면 모두가 불안해져.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_143.english: Sorry, I was trying to comfort you, but it seems I ended up burdening you instead.
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_143.korean: 미안, 위로하려던 건데 오히려 부담을 준 것 같네.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_144.english: If you're thinking of having a conversation, I'll come along too.
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_144.korean: 대화해 볼 생각이라면 나도 같이 갈게.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_146.english: … By any chance, can only young people become Desire Walkers?
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_146.korean: …혹시 데자이어 워커는 젊은 사람만 될 수 있는 거야?

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_147.english: We have no intention of killing you. Why don't you value your life?
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_147.korean: 우리는 너를 죽일 생각이 없어. 목숨을 소중히 여기는 게 어때?

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_148.english: Is there anything you want to try? Like something you want to see or eat.
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_148.korean: 해보고 싶은 건 없어? 보고 싶은 거라든가, 먹고 싶은 거라든가.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_15.english: You've brought something impressive again, Mr. Tenebris.
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_15.korean: 또 대단한 걸 들고 오셨네요. 테네브리스 씨.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_151.english: How can we have a proper conversation with you?
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_151.korean: 어떻게 하면 우리와 제대로 대화해 줄 거야?

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_152.english: No. Because I couldn't even have a proper conversation.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_153.english: Didn't you say that desire... is just about fighting to your heart's content?
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_153.korean: 그 욕망이라는 게… 그냥 마음껏 싸우는 거라고 말하지 않았어?

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_155.english: You say you look alike? You and Lily?

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_156.english: … Entering a coffin with Master to end one’s life… That’s it, right?
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_156.korean: …주인과 함께 관에 들어가 생을 마감한다… 그거지?

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_157.english: Yeah, it's better to make sure it's correct.
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_157.korean: 응, 확실히 확인해 두는 게 좋으니까.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_16.english: - I've never seen this person before... who is it?

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_17.english: Iris, I know what you're trying to say, but...
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_17.korean: 이리스, 무슨 말을 하고 싶은지는 알겠지만…

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_18.english: No need for lengthy explanations. I have already held back many times, so Tenebris, you would do well to act cautiously as well.
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_18.korean: 긴 말은 필요 없어요. 이미 여러 번 참았으니까,&n테네브리스, 당신도 신중히 행동하는 게 좋을 거예요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_19.english: Desire Walker is also a human being after all, and is just a victim of this void.
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_19.korean: 데자이어 워커도 결국은 사람이고, 이 공백의 피해자일 뿐이야.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_2.english: You have returned safely. You have worked hard, Commander. And you too, Eternity.
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_2.korean: 무사히 돌아왔군요. 고생 많으셨습니다, 사령관 씨. 그리고 이터니티 씨도.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_20.english: So, are you saying that being a victim gives you a free pass to kill people to your heart's content?
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_20.korean: 피해자면 뭐, 사람들을 마음껏 죽여도 면죄부를 쥐여준다는 건가요?

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_21.english: I absolutely cannot accept that logic.
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_21.korean: 그런 논리라면 절대 받아들일 수 없어요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_22.english: Iris… these people didn’t come in here and kill people of their own free will.
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_22.korean: 이리스… 이 사람들은 스스로 원해서 여기에 들어와 사람을 죽인 게 아니야.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_23.english: You know the saying that a dog that has bitten a person and tasted blood must be slaughtered immediately, right?
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_23.korean: 한 번 사람을 물고 피맛을 본 개는 바로 도살당해야 한다는 말, 아시죠?

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_24.english: Don't say that. Humans aren't dogs.
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_24.korean: 그렇게 말하지 마. 인간은 개가 아니야.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_25.english: I don't consider things like Desire to be human.
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_25.korean: 전 데자이어 같은 걸 인간이라고 생각하지 않거든요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_28.english: Whoa, whoa! Why are you trying to fight again!
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_28.korean: 워, 워! 왜 또 싸우려는 겁니까!

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_3.english: Oh, Mr. Nev? You didn't say anything about my hard work?
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_3.korean: 어라, 네브 씨? 저한테는 고생했다는 말이 없네요?

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_30.english: If this isn't a fight, then what is it! Yuma, please just quietly follow the adults' judgment for now!
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_30.korean: 지금 이게 싸우는 게 아니면 뭡니까!&n유마 씨, 지금은 조용히 어른들의 판단을 따라주세요!

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_31.english: So you call them adults... and since I'm powerless and young, you're telling me to just endure whatever and keep my eyes closed?
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_31.korean: 어른들이라…&n내가 힘이 없고 어리니까 뭐든 참으면서 눈 감고 있으라 이거죠?

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_32.english: Yes! Because at least I can make more level-headed judgments than you.
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_32.korean: 네! 적어도 당신보다는 좀 더 냉정한 판단을 할 수 있으니까요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_33.english: It’s not for nothing that I’m living a few more years.
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_33.korean: 괜히 몇 년 더 살고 있는 게 아니에요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_34.english: They always just say they'll handle it themselves...
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_34.korean: 언제나 그렇게 어른들이 알아서 한다고만 말하고…

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_35.english: I know exactly what you're worried about. I'll take full responsibility for bringing him here, so I hope you'll watch over him for a little while.
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_35.korean: 네가 뭘 걱정하는지는 나도 잘 알아.&n데려온 만큼 책임도 확실하게 질 테니까 조금은 지켜봐 줬으면 좋겠어.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_36.english: Mr. Nev! Isn't it because you always speak so weakly that they keep attacking you like this?! Try getting a little firmer and angry once in a while!
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_36.korean: 네브 씨! 언제나 그렇게 약하게 말하니까 이런 식으로 계속 덤벼드는 거 아닙니까!&n가끔씩은 좀 단호하게 화를 내 보세요!

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_37.english: Always acting like they're the best...

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_38.english: You think I can't do anything, do you? Fine, go ahead and keep ignoring me like that. I'll make sure to show you what happens if you keep ignoring me.
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_38.korean: 제가 아무것도 못 한다고 생각하시죠?&n좋아요, 어디 한 번 계속 그렇게 무시해 보세요.&n그렇게 무시하다가 무슨 일이 벌어지는지 꼭 한 번 보여드릴게요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_4.english: If I do this, it really makes me look like I didn't do anything!
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_4.korean: 이러면 정말 제가 아무것도 안 한 사람 같잖습니까!

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_40.english: Mr. Nev, if you leave him like that, he's going to cause a really big accident. Really, whatever it may be.
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_40.korean: 네브 씨, 저대로 두면 정말 큰 사고를 칠 겁니다.&n정말로 뭐가 됐든 말이죠.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_41.english: Things are already tough enough, so there is no need for us to start a fight among ourselves. We should accept that child's opinion as well.
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_41.korean: 안 그래도 힘든 때인데, 우리끼리 싸움 벌일 필요는 없어.&n저 아이의 의견도 받아들여야지.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_42.english: Hmm... I'm a little uneasy, but I understand.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_43.english: Then I will be going as well. You will have to think carefully about the problem, Yuma.
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_43.korean: 그럼 저도 가보겠습니다.&n유마 씨 문제는 잘 생각해 보셔야 할 겁니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_46.english: I'm sorry. I've shown you an unsightly side of myself.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_47.english: Sometimes I have absolutely no idea what to do.
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_47.korean: 가끔은 뭘 어떻게 해야 할지 전혀 모르겠습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_48.english: There are times when I even doubt if I am doing it right.
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_48.korean: 제가 제대로 하고 있는 건지조차 의심스러울 때가 있어요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_49.english: If I waver, everyone… becomes anxious too…

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_51.english: Thanks to you, I feel like my eyes are opening a little. You are truly the Commander.
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_51.korean: 덕분에 눈이 조금 뜨이는 것 같습니다. 역시 사령관님이시군요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_52.english: I will now confine this child in a place where they will not be harmed by others.
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_52.korean: 이제 이 아이를, 다른 사람들에게 피해 주지 않을 장소에 구속해 두겠습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_53.english: Understood. Then I will let you know after the maintenance is finished.
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_53.korean: 알겠습니다.&n그럼 정비가 끝난 뒤에 안내해 드리죠.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_55.english: - After checking on Eternity's condition, I followed Tenebris to the basement.
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_55.korean: - 이터니티의 상태를 확인한 뒤, 나는 테네브리스를 따라 지하실로 향했다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_56.english: He must have regained consciousness by now. I have restrained him so he cannot move for now... please be careful.
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_56.korean: 지금쯤이면 정신을 차렸을 겁니다.&n일단 움직이지 못하게 구속해 두었지만… 아무쪼록 조심해 주세요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_59.english: Will you be entering with Ms. Eternity as well?

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_6.english: No, why are you saying such hurtful things! You have to tell me how hard I've been cheering for Miss Eternity!
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_6.korean: 아니, 무슨 말씀을 그렇게 섭섭하게 하십니까!&n제가 이터니티 양을 얼마나 열심히 응원했는데요!

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_60.english: Yes. I will be with you wherever you are, Master.
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_60.korean: 네. 주인님이 계시는 곳이라면 어디든 함께할 거예요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_61.english: … Understood. With Miss Eternity, there shouldn't be any major problems.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_62.english: Then, I will open the door.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_64.english: I expected it, but... the wounds have all healed. Not only the broken arm, but even all the hair that was cut off...
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_64.korean: 예상은 했지만… 상처는 전부 나았군요.&n부러졌던 팔은 물론, 잘려나갔던 머리칼까지 전부…

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_65.english: I can't be certain, but the possibility is high. The younger you are, the easier it is to be swayed by emotions, and just as easily consumed by Desire energy.
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_65.korean: 확신할 순 없지만 가능성은 높습니다.&n나이가 어릴수록 감정에 휘둘리기 쉽고, 그만큼 데자이어 에너지에 잠식되기도 쉽지요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_66.english: Anyway, starting now, I will have a conversation with this child—

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_67.english: I do not want to talk to a barbarian who stands and converses while a guest is sitting. I hope you go and learn your manners again.
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_67.korean: 손님을 앉혀놓고 서서 대화하는 야만인과는 이야기하고 싶지 않답니다.&n예절부터 다시 배우고 오시길 바랄게요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_69.english: The commander over here is a very wise man. Let's at least talk a little.
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_69.korean: 이쪽에 계신 사령관님은 굉장히 현명한 분입니다.&n이야기만이라도 조금 해 보시죠.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_7.english: Okay, okay. You worked hard too.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_70.english: Conversation is nothing but a hollow flow of sound. I don't need anything else, so why don't you just kill me right now?
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_70.korean: 대화란 건 그저 공허한 소리의 흐름일 뿐이랍니다.&n다른 건 필요 없으니 차라리 지금 당장 절 죽이시는 게 어떻습니까?

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_71.english: Now, as you can see, the wounds I sustained fighting you have already healed. You shouldn't let yourself be swept away by a ridiculous sense of justice and miss this opportunity.
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_71.korean: 자, 보시다시피 당신들과 싸워 입었던 상처는 이미 다 나았습니다.&n시답잖은 정의감에 휩쓸려 이런 기회를 놓치시면 안 되죠.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_72.english: Life is worthless to me. Of course, the same goes for your lives. Now then, go ahead and kill me.
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_72.korean: 저에게 목숨 따위는 가치가 없답니다.&n물론, 당신들의 목숨도 마찬가지지요.&n자, 그러니 어서 죽이시죠.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_76.english: - This… isn’t going to be easy.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_77.english: If you wish to converse with a noble, you should show proper etiquette. I have lived in a household where I was kicked out over the placement of a single piece of tableware.
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_77.korean: 귀족과 대화를 원한다면, 응당한 예법을 보이시죠.&n저는 식기 하나 놓는 위치 때문에 내쫓기던 집안에서 살아왔답니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_78.english: If not, then why don't you try barking like beasts? Doesn't that suit you, who futilely cling to life in a moldy basement like this?
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_78.korean: 그게 아니라면 차라리 짐승처럼 짖어보시던지요.&n이런 곰팡이 핀 지하실에서 부질없이 목숨을 연명하는 당신들에겐 어울리지 않습니까?

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_79.english: Now, go ahead and kill me. Otherwise, I will escape this place and kill everyone.
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_79.korean: 자, 어서 죽이시죠.&n그렇지 않으면 제가 이곳을 빠져나가 모두 죽여버리겠습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_8.english: He has not regained consciousness yet.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_80.english: I really don't understand why they want to fight to this extent...
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_80.korean: 대체 왜 이렇게까지 싸우기를 원하는지 모르겠군요…

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_81.english: - I thought I was used to this kind of thing by now... but am I still far from it?
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_81.korean: - 이런 건 이제 익숙해졌다고 생각했는데… 아직 멀었나?

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_84.english: It's you again. Well, actually, if it were a maid, she might at least observe some basic etiquette.
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_84.korean: 또 당신이군요.&n뭐, 오히려 메이드라면 최소한의 예법은 지킬지도 모르겠네요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_85.english: My name is Eternity. Nice to meet you.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_86.english: - The girl, seeing Eternity greeting politely with the proper etiquette of a maid, looked at her for a moment and nodded.
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_86.korean: - 메이드답게 예를 갖추며 공손히 인사하는 이터니티를 본 소녀는, 잠시 바라보다 고개를 끄덕였다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_87.english: Okay, I’ll give you a passing grade, barely. I am Lily Blümmerchen. It’s a short time, but I look forward to working with you.
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_87.korean: 좋아요, 아슬아슬하게 합격점은 드리죠.&n릴리 블룸메르헨입니다.&n짧은 시간이지만 잘 부탁드리죠.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_88.english: Lily... do you want to fight?

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_89.english: Is there a special reason to stop living?
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_89.korean: 살아있는 걸 멈추는 데에 특별한 이유가 필요할까요?

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_9.english: For now, nothing has been confirmed other than the will to fight... so I plan to try having a proper conversation once she wakes up.
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_9.korean: 일단 싸우려는 의지 말고는 확인된 바가 없으니… 깨어나면 제대로 된 대화를 시도해 볼 생각입니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_90.english: I can sense the image of 'death' in you as well.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_91.english: Yes. Because I am a being designed to spend my entire life with my Master and then enter the same coffin to end my life.
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_91.korean: 네. 저는 주인님과 일생을 함께한 뒤, 같은 관에 들어가 삶을 마감하도록 설계된 존재니까요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_92.english: So someday when the time comes, I will accept death.
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_92.korean: 그러니 언젠가 때가 오면, 죽음을 받아들일 거예요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_93.english: A plan… I don’t know what that means, but if that man dies right here and now, what would you do?
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_93.korean: 설계라… 무슨 뜻인지는 모르겠지만, 그렇다면 지금 이 자리에서 저 사내가 죽는다면 어떻게 하실 건가요?

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_94.english: Are you going to take your own life right away, too?

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_96.english: Hmph, how lame. I have been taught how to stand on my own with the pride of a noble since I was born.
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_96.korean: 흥, 시시하군요.&n전 태어났을 때부터 귀족의 긍지를 가지고 자립하는 법을 배워왔습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_97.english: I took on the challenges, overcame the hardships, and achieved results, allowing me to smile alone at the highest point.
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_97.korean: 어려움은 도전했고, 힘든 일은 극복했으며, 결과를 쟁취해 가장 높은 곳에서 홀로 웃을 수 있었죠.

LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_98.english: Unlike you… I don’t hesitate for a moment. Did you know?
LastCorruptedRecord2-3ED_98.korean: 당신과 달리… 조금의 망설임도 없습니다. 아셨나요?

LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_1.english: - The fight between the two, which had resumed, was sparking even more fiercely than before.
LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_1.korean: - 다시 시작된 두 사람의 싸움은, 이전보다 더욱 격렬하게 불꽃을 튀기고 있었다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_12.english: It was fun, just as I expected. It’s the first time I’ve ever had this much fun.
LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_12.korean: 역시 즐거웠어요. 이 정도로 즐거운 건 처음이랍니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_13.english: It seems it wasn't just bluff after all. If only I could have moved a little faster, I could have fought longer.
LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_13.korean: 과연 허세는 아니었던 모양이군요.&n제가 조금 더 빨리 움직일 수 있었더라면 더 싸울 수 있었을 텐데 말이죠.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_14.english: I have no intention of acting pathetic after being defeated. Now, please take this useless life away.
LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_14.korean: 패배한 주제에 구차해질 생각은 없답니다.&n자, 어서 이 부질없는 목숨을 가져가주시지요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_15.english: Lily... are you really okay with that?

LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_16.english: Ah. Another sermon? Your master is like that too; you really are very interested in other people's business.
LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_16.korean: 아아. 또 설교인가요?&n당신의 주인도 그렇고, 정말 남 일에 관심이 많군요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_17.english: What I want is to fight the strong, so how many times do I have to tell you for you to understand?
LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_17.korean: 제가 원하는 건 강한 자와 싸우는 거라 몇 번을 말해야 이해하시는 거죠?

LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_18.english: Stop spouting nonsense and just shoot.
LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_18.korean: 헛소리 지껄이지 말고 빨리 쏘기나 하시죠.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_19.english: No, it's different. If I really wanted more fights, I wouldn't throw my life away like this.
LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_19.korean: 아니요 달라요.&n정말 더 많은 싸움을 원하신다면, 이렇게 목숨을 내던지지 않을 거예요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_2.english: That look in your eyes… I really like it! Have you finally thrown away that ridiculous manners?
LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_2.korean: 그 눈빛… 굉장히 마음에 드는군요!&n이제야 그 같잖은 예절을 집어던지신 건가요?

LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_20.english: Lily does not value her own life.
LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_20.korean: 릴리 님은 스스로의 생명에 가치를 두지 않고 계세요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_22.english: Isn't that exactly Lily's true desire?
LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_22.korean: 그게 바로 릴리 님의 진짜 욕망이 아닌가요?

LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_25.english: I just fought. Fight, and fight, and fight again...
LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_25.korean: 전 그저 싸웠을 뿐이에요. 싸우고, 싸우고 또 싸우고…

LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_27.english: Isn't that about finding someone who can kill you?
LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_27.korean: 그건, 자신을 죽일 수 있는 사람을 찾는 게 아닌가요?

LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_28.english: … Please don't interrupt me arbitrarily; it is rude.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_29.english: - Now I finally understand everything. All of Lily's actions up until now were full of contradictions.
LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_29.korean: - 이제야 전부 납득이 간다.&n릴리의 지금까지의 모든 행동은 모순투성이었다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_3.english: I really love it…! Let's enjoy this until I run out of breath!
LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_3.korean: 정말 마음에 들어요…! 숨이 끊어질 때까지 즐겨보도록 하죠!

LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_30.english: - She liked fighting, but not to the extent that she craved it; she ignored weak enemies and placed meaning only in seeking out strong opponents.
LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_30.korean: - 싸움을 좋아하지만 갈망한다고 할 정도는 아니었고, 약한 적은 무시하면서 강한 상대를 찾는 것에만 의미를 두었다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_31.english: - It was also strange to hear that she was satisfied with dying while fighting. A Desire Walker would have to survive, if only to fulfill their desires, but Lily was different.
LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_31.korean: - 싸우다 죽는 것으로 만족한다는 말도 이상했다.&n데자이어 워커라면 욕망을 이루기 위해서라도 살아남아야 하는데, 릴리는 달랐다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_32.english: However, there is one exception. It is 'giving up one's life'... If that itself is desire, everything is explained. Lily simply... wanted to die.
LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_32.korean: - 하지만 한 가지 예외가 있다.&n바로 ‘목숨을 버리는 것’… 그 자체가 욕망이라면 모든 게 설명된다.&n릴리는 그저… 죽고 싶었던 거다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_33.english: The desire to die made my Desire Energy stronger, and to think that because it became stronger, I ended up with a body that cannot die easily… How cruel.
LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_33.korean: - 죽고 싶다는 욕망이 데자이어 에너지를 강하게 만들었고, 강해진 탓에 오히려 쉽게 죽을 수 없는 몸이 되어버리다니… 지독하군.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_34.english: Whatever it is, what do you intend to do about it? Is there anything that will change now?
LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_34.korean: 뭐가 됐든, 어쩌겠다는 거죠?&n이제 와서 달라질 게 있나요?

LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_35.english: If you kill me, it's over; otherwise, a new slaughter will simply begin. Now is your chance. Hurry... kill me.
LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_35.korean: 당신이 절 죽이면 끝, 그렇지 않으면 또 새로운 살육이 시작될 뿐.&n지금이 기회예요. 어서… 절 죽이시죠.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_36.english: Lily, you are being drawn by your own power.
LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_36.korean: 릴리 님은 자신의 힘에 이끌리고 계시군요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_37.english: It must be moving as a mass of madness, driven by an uncontrollable force that doesn't even allow for suicide.
LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_37.korean: 제어할 수 없는 힘으로 자살조차 허용되지 않은 채, 광기의 덩어리가 되어 움직이고 있는 거겠죠.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_38.english: That is why you are looking for someone who can overcome even your own madness.
LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_38.korean: 그렇기 때문에 자신의 광기조차 이길 수 있는 사람을 찾고 계신 거예요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_39.english: Shut your mouth and kill me quickly…!!!

LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_4.english: Lily... do you really not know why you are fighting?
LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_4.korean: 릴리 님은… 정말 자신이 싸우는 이유를 모르시는 건가요?

LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_41.english: There's nothing left in this world anyway! The things I want aren't here anymore!
LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_41.korean: 어차피 이 세상에 남은 건 없어!&n내가 원하는 것들은 더 이상 여기에 없다고!

LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_42.english: Rather than living in a place like this… I’d rather go over there! To a place with more!
LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_42.korean: 이딴 곳에 사느니 차라리… 저쪽으로 가야 해! 더 많은 게 있는 곳으로!

LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_43.english: So stop talking nonsense and kill me! I've killed countless people! What right does a murderer like this have to live?! You all hate me, don't you?!
LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_43.korean: 그러니까 잔말 말고 빨리 죽여! 난 수많은 사람을 죽였어!&n이런 살인마가 살 가치가 어디 있겠어?! 너희 모두 날 미워하고 있잖아?!

LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_44.english: You asked me. If Master were to pass away, would I take my own life...
LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_44.korean: 저에게 물으셨죠. 주인님이 돌아가신다면, 목숨을 끊을 거냐고…

LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_46.english: The old me would have answered 'yes' without hesitation. But now it's different.
LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_46.korean: 예전의 저라면 망설임 없이 ‘네’라고 대답했을 거예요.&n하지만 지금은 달라요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_47.english: Because I know that isn't what you want right now, Master.
LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_47.korean: 지금은 그게 주인님이 원하는 게 아니라는 걸 알고 있으니까요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_48.english: If my master passes away, I will definitely be very sad. I will probably shed a lot of tears, too.
LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_48.korean: 주인님이 돌아가신다면 저는 분명 엄청 슬플 거예요. 눈물도 많이 흘리겠죠.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_49.english: But I won't take my own life.
LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_49.korean: 하지만 스스로 목숨을 끊지는 않을 거예요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_5.english: Well, I wonder? Would knowing the reason really change anything?
LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_5.korean: 글쎄요?&n이유를 안다고 해서 뭔가 변하긴 할까요?

LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_50.english: Because that is the only repayment I, who am left behind, can give to my master.
LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_50.korean: 그게 남겨진 제가 주인님께 드릴 수 있는 유일한 보답이니까요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_52.korean: 아니야… 난 그런 거 필요 없어…

LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_53.korean: 혼자 살아남는 건 아무 의미도 없다고!!

LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_54.english: Why?! Why did my brother have to die?!
LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_54.korean: 왜죠?! 어째서 오라버니가 죽어야 했던 거죠?!

LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_55.english: Why did I have to be eaten by a beast?!

LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_58.english: If not, just kill me instead!

LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_59.english: I'm saying please let me meet my older brother!!
LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_59.korean: 오라버니를 만날 수 있게 해달란 말이에요!!

LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_6.english: We are simply fighting each other, risking our lives.
LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_6.korean: 저희는 그저 서로 자신의 목숨을 걸고 싸울 뿐이랍니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_62.english: It ended more anticlimactically than expected.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_63.english: If my prediction were correct, Mr. Nev should have subdued Miss Lily here.
LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_63.korean: 제 예상대로라면, 여기서는 네브 씨가 릴리 양을 제압했어야 했습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_64.english: Of course, Mr. Nev wouldn't kill Miss Lily for such a trivial reason.
LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_64.korean: 물론 네브 씨가 시답잖은 이유로 릴리 양을 죽일 리는 없겠죠.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_65.english: If that had been the case, Miss Lily's desire to die would have grown stronger, and that desire would have awakened even more Desire Energy…
LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_65.korean: 그랬다면 릴리 양의 죽고 싶다는 욕망은 더 강해지고, 그 욕망이 더 많은 데자이어 에너지를 불러일으켰을 텐데…

LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_66.english: However, if things continue like this, that desire might actually disappear.
LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_66.korean: 하지만 이대로라면, 오히려 그 욕망이 사라져버릴지도 모르겠군요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_68.english: Commander, isn't this going a bit too far?
LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_68.korean: 사령관 씨. 이건 조금 도가 지나친 게 아닙니까?

LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_69.english: I intended to just watch and not necessarily get involved in this matter, but...
LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_69.korean: 이번 일에는 굳이 개입하지 않고 지켜보려 했는데…

LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_70.english: Now that things have turned out this way... I guess it can't be helped.
LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_70.korean: 이렇게 된 이상… 어쩔 수 없겠군요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_8.english: Then I will treat you with all my heart.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_9.english: Hahaha, alright! Then, shall we begin? The deadly mist that takes each other's lives!
LastCorruptedRecord2-4ED_9.korean: 후후후, 좋아요! 그럼 시작해 볼까요?&n서로의 목숨을 빼앗는 죽음의 연무를!

LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_1.english: - To fight Lily, we headed to a place far from the camp.
LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_1.korean: - 릴리와 싸우기 위해 우리는 캠프에서 멀리 떨어진 장소로 향했다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_11.english: … Are you saying you’ll feel sorry for me after hearing that?

LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_12.english: Pouring your emotions into a beast only brings back cold claws that tear through your veins, you know?
LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_12.korean: 짐승에게 감정을 쏟아봐야 돌아오는 건 혈관을 찢는 차가운 발톱뿐이랍니다?

LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_13.english: Hmph... well, in that case, let me explain.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_14.english: She went around killing everything in front of her, regardless of whether it was human or monster. Well, that's the end.
LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_14.korean: 사람이든 괴물이든 가리지 않고, 눈앞의 모든 걸 죽이고 다녔답니다.&n자, 끝이에요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_15.english: I don't know how many times I've told you that I just want to fight.
LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_15.korean: 단지 싸우고 싶을 뿐이라고 몇 번을 말씀드렸는지 모르겠군요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_17.english: … We are about to engage in a life-or-death battle, so we don't have the luxury to talk about such things.
LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_17.korean: …곧 죽고 죽이는 싸움을 벌일 텐데, 그런 얘기를 나눌 여유는 없답니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_18.english: Ugh… Is that how you’re going to play it? Hmph… Well, it would be troublesome if I refused and you ended up changing your mind.
LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_18.korean: 윽… 그렇게 나오시나요?&n흥… 뭐, 제가 거절하다 끝내 당신이 마음을 바꾸기라도 하면 곤란하긴 하겠군요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_19.english: Alright. I’ll keep you company for a moment on my way. What is it that you are so curious about?
LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_19.korean: 좋아요. 걸어가는 길에 잠시 상대해 드리죠.&n제 무엇이 그렇게 궁금하신지요?

LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_2.english: - When we released the restraints, Lily looked puzzled for a moment, but she did not thrash around and quietly followed us.
LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_2.korean: - 구속구를 풀어주자 릴리는 잠시 의아한 표정을 지었지만, 날뛰지 않고 조용히 우리를 따라왔다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_20.english: Of course. Do you know about the Blümmerchen family?

LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_21.english: Hmph, it doesn't really matter if you don't know.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_22.english: I have no intention of being understood by others. Because, to be honest, I don't really know either.
LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_22.korean: 남에게 이해받을 생각은 없답니다.&n저도 사실 잘 모르니까요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_23.english: All I remember is… that scene where the monsters were devouring the flesh of my precious family.
LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_23.korean: 그저 기억하는 건… 괴물들이 소중한 가족의 살점을 파먹고 있었던 그 장면뿐이죠.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_24.english: Amidst the mix of anger and disgust, when I smashed the monster's head with a golf club... I was seized by an inexplicable sense of liberation and couldn't stop myself.
LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_24.korean: 분노와 혐오가 한데 뒤섞인 와중에, 그 괴물의 머리를 골프채로 짓뭉갰을 때…&n알 수 없는 해방감에 사로잡혀 몸을 멈출 수 없었답니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_25.english: - … I lost my family because of the blank space. It's similar to Haru.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_26.english: - But isn't it so different from Haru, who has the same plural emotions?
LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_26.korean: - 그런데 같은 복수의 감정을 가진 하루와 이렇게 다르지?

LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_27.english: You have got it wrong. Revenge for my family means nothing to me anymore. I am simply looking for a stronger opponent.
LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_27.korean: 잘못 짚으셨군요.&n제게 가족의 복수 따위는 이제 아무 의미도 없어요.&n저는 그저 더 강한 상대를 찾을 뿐입니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_28.english: Well, even if I did know, I wouldn't want to tell you.
LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_28.korean: 글쎄요.&n안다고 해도 당신에겐 말하고 싶지 않군요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_3.english: I have arrived. If it is a park on the inside, I won't be disturbed by anyone.
LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_3.korean: 도착했습니다.&n안쪽에 있는 공원이라면 누구에게도 방해받지 않을 겁니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_30.english: - One day, to avenge her mother, Stella became a Desire Walker out of grief over the loss of her friend.
LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_30.korean: - 하루는 엄마의 복수를 위해, 스텔라는 친구를 잃은 슬픔에 데자이어 워커가 됐어.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_31.english: - But Lily… doesn't she even know why she became a Desire Walker?
LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_31.korean: - 그런데 릴리는… 자신이 왜 데자이어 워커가 되었는지조차 모르는 건가?

LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_32.english: - I wonder if they are deliberately hiding it, or if there is something they themselves are unaware of…
LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_32.korean: - 일부러 숨기고 있는 건지, 아니면 스스로도 모르는 무언가가 있는 건지…

LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_33.english: - If you don't know the purpose and reason... it's hard to get this child out of Desire.
LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_33.korean: - 목적과 이유를 알 수 없다면… 이 아이를 데자이어에서 벗어나게 하기 어려워.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_35.english: I've said all this, so you wouldn't bring up the idea of ​​not fighting now, would you?
LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_35.korean: 이렇게까지 말했는데 이제 와서 싸우지 않겠다는 말은 꺼내지 않으시겠죠?

LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_36.english: Trust? It's not like that. I don't trust others that easily.
LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_36.korean: 신뢰? 그런 건 아닙니다.&n전 타인을 그렇게 쉽게 믿지 않아요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_37.english: I wasted time on something useless. That is really the end of our conversation.
LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_37.korean: 쓸데없는 일에 시간을 할애했군요.&n대화는 이제 정말로 여기까지입니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_38.english: It seems you still have more to say, but I will not answer you now.
LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_38.korean: 아직 하실 말씀이 더 남아 있으신 것 같지만, 이제 대답해드리지 않을 겁니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_39.english: Isn't it your maid, not you, who is fighting with me in the first place? Since I have engaged in this much conversation even though I am not the party involved... I suppose my duties as a noble are sufficient now.
LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_39.korean: 애초에 저와 싸우는 건 당신이 아니라, 당신의 메이드 아닌가요?&n당사자도 아니면서 이 정도 담소를 나눠드렸으니… 귀족으로서의 책무는 이제 충분하겠지요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_40.english: Whatever the case, I never want to run into you again.
LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_40.korean: 무엇이 되었든, 저는 이제 다시는 당신과 마주치고 싶지 않군요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_45.english: - Could it be… Lily’s true desire is…

LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_46.english: Come to think of it, I don't understand, Maid.
LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_46.korean: 그러고 보니 이해가 되지 않는군요, 메이드 씨.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_47.english: If you intended to kill her, you could have done it right there on the spot. Isn't being restrained the opportunity?
LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_47.korean: 죽일 마음이 있었다면 그 자리에서 당장 죽이면 됐을 텐데요?&n몸이 구속되어 있을 때가 기회 아닌가요?

LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_49.english: … Hmph, well, I suppose it doesn't matter.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_5.english: Master, then I will be going.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_50.english: After all, you fighting me is likely your master's order.
LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_50.korean: 어차피 당신이 나와 싸우는 건 주인의 명령일 테니까요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_53.english: I am not fighting with Lily because of my master's orders.
LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_53.korean: 제가 릴리 님과 싸우는 건 주인님의 명령 때문이 아니에요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_54.english: I am fighting of my own free will.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_56.english: Hahaha… Hahahaha! Ahahahahaha!! Good! That’s exactly it! That’s how it should be!
LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_56.korean: 후후… 후후후! 아하하하하하!!&n좋습니다! 바로 그거예요! 그렇게 나와야지요!

LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_57.english: In that case, I should repay you as well!

LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_6.english: It's okay. You can fight well enough on your own.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_60.english: Eternity, are you going to be okay? If it's difficult for you alone, I...

LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_61.english: Wait, I have something I want to ask.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_63.english: Won't you tell me about the past you remember?

LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_64.english: I'm not trying to pity you. I'm just asking because I have a question.
LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_64.korean: 동정하려는 게 아니야. 그저 의문이 있어서 물어보는 거야.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_65.english: There’s no way that’s the end of it. There must be a desire you have.
LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_65.korean: 그걸로 끝일 리는 없어. 네가 바라는 욕망이 반드시 있을 거야.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_66.english: No, if I simply wanted to fight, I would have lost my reason long ago.
LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_66.korean: 아니, 단순히 싸우고 싶은 거라면 진작에 이성을 잃었겠지.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_67.english: I'm asking because I'm genuinely curious. You just need to tell me a little bit.
LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_67.korean: 정말로 네가 궁금해서 그래. 조금이라도 들려주면 돼.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_69.english: Well then, shouldn’t you return the favor? Like a true noble?
LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_69.korean: 그렇다면 너도 그에 대한 보답은 해야 하지 않겠어? 귀족답게?

LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_7.english: That is an incredible display of confidence, completely devoid of any consideration for the listener. However, I actually like it.
LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_7.korean: 듣는 이에 대한 배려라곤 전혀 없는 대단한 자신감이군요.&n하지만 전, 오히려 마음에 듭니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_70.english: Do you remember what happened before you entered the blank space?

LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_71.english: … I know she is a famous noble's daughter.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_72.english: How did a young lady from such a wealthy noble family end up like this?
LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_72.korean: 그런 유복한 귀족의 영애가 어쩌다가 이렇게 된 건데?

LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_73.english: Do you perhaps want to get revenge on the blank space?

LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_74.english: What on earth are you looking for in that behavior?
LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_74.korean: 그 행동으로 대체 무슨 의미를 찾는 거지?

LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_75.english: Am I actually trusted, in a way...?

LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_77.english: I'll just say one last thing. It doesn't matter if you don't answer.
LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_77.korean: 마지막으로 한 마디만 할게. 대답해 주지 않아도 상관없어.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_79.english: There is definitely someone who will protect you and stand by your side.
LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_79.korean: 너를 지켜줄 사람, 네 곁에 같이 서 줄 사람은 분명 있어.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_8.english: Now, let's ignore this person and move on quickly. I wonder how long you can keep that bravado going... I'd like to watch.
LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_8.korean: 자, 이런 사람은 무시하고 빨리 앞으로 가지요.&n과연 당신이 언제까지 그 허세를 이어갈 수 있을지… 지켜보고 싶군요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_80.english: If you open your heart, you will be able to move forward much more brightly.
LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_80.korean: 마음을 연다면, 너는 훨씬 더 밝게 나아갈 수 있을 거야.

LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_9.english: Isn't that enough of a story? I have nothing more to say.
LastCorruptedRecord2-4OP_9.korean: 이야기라면 이제 충분하지 않나요?&n더는 드릴 말씀이 없습니다만.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_10.english: … Lil, I have something I want to tell you today.
LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_10.korean: …릴, 오늘은 너에게 하고 싶은 말이 있구나.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_101.english: Player: Commander &nCharacter: Lily Blümmerchen &nEnding Branch: Achieved.
LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_101.korean: 플레이어 : 사령관&n인물 : 릴리 블룸메르헨&n엔딩 분기 : 달성 완료.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_102.english: Permission to view the following records.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_109.english: Start collecting clear data for the fourth record.
LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_109.korean: 네 번 째 기록의 클리어 데이터 수집을 시작합니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_110.english: Player Commander, I hope you stay strong.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_111.english: <Lilly Blümmerchen: The Sharpness of Rushing Madness> END.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_112.english: I'm telling you, it's not that big of a wound.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_113.english: It’s an experience I never want to go through again, though…
LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_113.korean: 다시는 겪고 싶지 않은 경험이지만 말이지…

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_118.english: … May I ask you one thing?

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_119.english: Are you still thinking about wanting to die?

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_12.english: As your older brother, I am truly happy that you always trust and rely on me.
LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_12.korean: 네가 늘 나를 믿고 의지해주는 건 오빠로서 정말 기쁘단다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_122.english: Well then, since I was treated to black tea, I should reciprocate.
LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_122.korean: 그럼, 홍차를 대접받았으니 나도 답례를 해야겠네.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_123.english: Is there anything you want from me?

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_127.english: That's a bit of a difficult request, isn't it?

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_13.english: Having a younger sister to be proud of is also my pride as an older brother.
LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_13.korean: 자랑스러운 여동생을 둔 게 오빠의 자랑이기도 하고.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_14.english: But… on the other hand, I’m worried about whether you’ll be okay when I’m not around.
LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_14.korean: 하지만… 한편으로는 내가 없을 때 네가 괜찮을지, 걱정이 된다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_16.english: Lil… my proud little sister. You are not alone.
LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_16.korean: 릴… 나의 자랑스러운 여동생아.&n너는 혼자가 아니라는 걸.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_17.english: Someday, someone will definitely appear to protect you and stand by your side.
LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_17.korean: 언젠가 너를 지켜주고, 네 곁에 함께 서줄 사람이 반드시 나타날 거야.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_18.english: If you can open your heart to that person, you will surely be able to move forward more brightly.
LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_18.korean: 그 사람에게 마음을 열 수 있다면, 너는 분명 더 밝게 앞으로 나아갈 수 있을 거다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_19.english: Could there really be such a person?
